programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The men's team get a head start on the first challenge after some successful crab fishing, but can the women edge ahead when it comes to the cooking? Dinner service sees an infuriated Gordon throw an entire team out of the kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the chefs are given a rude awakening as they are tasked with entering an icy lake early in the morning to match up fish heads to their correct bodies. The winning team end up getting even wetter during surfing lessons.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the remaining teams are given an American comfort food challenge, with Gordon expecting them to come up with some outstanding spaghetti, burger, pizza and mac and cheese dishes. The challenge winners are taken aboard a ship for cocktails.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the teams compete to make the most impressive cheesy dishes in order to win an ocean adventure. Later, divisions between the strong and weak contestants grow during another star-studded dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the chefs compete in a special lunch service in honour of two charities run by Los Angeles firefighters, Nick surprises everyone when he bumps into an ex-girlfriend, and further tensions emerge during dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the chefs must prepare a Greek meal each choosing a protein as a basis for their dish. Meanwhile, Josh gives himself a motivational speech after being singled out for his lack of leadership.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Siste jobb
programme.desc: Walker prøver å hjelpe en prøveløslatt person som vil få orden på livet, men som blir tvunget til å begå et siste tyveri av en korrupt tilsynsfører.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Familieproblemer
programme.desc: Walker kjemper mot en mann som tror han er uovervinnelig når det gjelder forbrytelser fordi søsteren hans er under vitnebeskyttelse.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Henne kan man ri elva med
programme.desc: En dyrlege prøver å finne ut hvorfor mange lokale dyr har dødd, men når han nærmer seg svaret, blir han presset av veien og drept med en håndgranat.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: En uskyldig mann
programme.desc: Walker tror en mann som er dømt til døden i gasskammeret, har blitt utpresset til å si ser skyldig, og kjemper mot klokken for å bevise hans uskyld.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Gladiatorens kveld
programme.desc: Walker og Trivette utgir seg for å være gateboksere for å infiltrere en gjeng utpressere som har ødelagt livet til vennen deres.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Ebony fra Colorado Springs tar militærutdanning, men må bytte ut uniformen med mammaklær. Hun og kjæresten Josh vil inn i flyvåpenet, men en baby kan hindre dem i å verve seg, eller til og med i å fullføre skolen.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Sørstatsjenta Whitney er familiens baby, men da både hun og moren blir gravide, blir det for fullt i huset. Whitney og kjæresten Weston må flytte ut og stifte sin egen familie.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Den 16 år gamle småbyjenta Catelynn er fornuftens røst i en ellers ilter familie. Med støtte fra kjæresten Tyler bestemmer hun seg for adopsjon uten foreldrenes samtykke.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Paulie og Mike må sjonglere flere grupper med jenter. Det blir slåsskamp i baren, og en av deltakerne blir slått ned.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Photographer
programme.desc: The imagination of the IMF is put to the test when a massive spy ring in the U.S. headed by fashion photographer, David Redding, threatens to cripple the country with a deadly pneumonic plague.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Spy
programme.desc: NATO's missile defense system plans, mapped on two separate overlays for security reasons, are the target of a Central European spy organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Game of Chess
programme.desc: Recovering a million dollars in gold bullion is the job of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Emerald
programme.desc: The IMF is assigned to recover microfilm plans for manipulating international gold reserves.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Condemned
programme.desc: Jim Phelps comes to the aid of a personal friend.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Karlstad
programme.desc: Tareq visits sunny Karlstad! Here, food is prepared by Vänern's shores and in Värmland's deep forests. Butter-fried Zander, crepes and cooking over an open fire are on the menu.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of (Part 2)
programme.desc: Once again, Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lund
programme.desc: In this episode, Tareq visits Lund, a thousand-year old city in southern Sweden. Lund is surrounded by the richest farmland in the country, and we explore nearby islands and meet entrepreneurs making highly-regarded local products.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Tareq sails out to Bornholm, a Danish island close to southern tip of Sweden. The islanders are fiercely self-sufficient and this attitude reflects in the huge number of food producers making products that are sold both locally and internationally.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Jokkmokk
programme.desc: Far above the Arctic Circle, Tareq explores the wild country around Jokkmokk. Here, the Sami people lived from what the land provides for thousands of years. This wild cuisine is as extreme as the weather here.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Trip To Iceland
programme.desc: Den nye gutten Kyle gjør seg hjemmekoselig i huset gjennom å tilbringe natten med Holly, og Geordie-gjengen og deres 'Tash on Tours' blir internasjonale når de flyr til Reykjavik på Island for utagerende festing.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Marnie Exposes Gary
programme.desc: Etter å ha sjekket ut Islands gutter, jenter og geysirer, vender Geordie-gjengen tilbake til Toon. Der spisser det seg til når Aaron og Scott får høre sannheten om Gary og Marnie, og Garys tvilsomme guttekodeks.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The New Boss
programme.desc: Buzzin! Våre favorittfestløver er tilbake og alle sjokkeres av at Vicky blir sjefen deres. Holly vil ikke virke billig, derfor vil hun ikke ligge med Kyle, og Marnie dumper Aaron når hun oppdager at han har løyet for henne.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Party Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Holly har fest, men gutta braker sammen når Marnie prøver å gjøre Aaron sjalu ved å kline med Kyle. Sjefen Vicky arrangerer singelkveld for homofile, og Charlotte avslører at det kan bli slutt med kjæresten.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Bonjour Geordies
programme.desc: Ooh la la! Gjengen drar til Paris for en jobb med Tash-On Tours, men kan Aaron tilgi Kyle for at han kysset Marnie? Vicky blir uprofesjonelt stupfull på jobben, og når de kommer hjem, drar Charlotte for å prate med kjæresten sin.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Single Charlotte
programme.desc: Charlotte og Gary nærmer seg hverandre etter at hun kommer tilbake fra et oppgjør med kjæresten. Vicky strever med å overbevise Marnie om å ta jobben på alvor, og klørne kommer ut i en fryktelig krangel.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Vinny
programme.desc: Mike kommer tilbake, bare for å finne ut at Danny har truet med å finne nye medboere! Jentene leier strippere til Pauly og Mikes ville bursdagsfest, og deltakerne reiser til Staten Island for å kidnappe Vinny. Men vil han bli med dem?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Nothing But Nice
programme.desc: Vinny kommer tilbake, og alle feirer. Mike prøver å være hyggelig, men ender opp med å irritere guttene. Snooki sliter med en ubehagelig situasjon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Follow Game
programme.desc: The Situation samler opplysninger for å ødelegge for en av de andre, og for en gangs skyld er det ikke Snooki. JWoww får panikk fordi Roger har forsvunnet og ikke ringer henne tilbake.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Love at the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Alle deltakerne er konsentrert om sine nåværende kjærester, men det er aldri fred og ro i huset. En av deltakerne skaper drama for The Meatballs, mens Jennis utfordrende klær skaper problemer for Roger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sharp Objects
programme.desc: Deltakerne prøver å unngå et haiangrep på fisketur. Jenni konfronterer Paulys stalker. Snooki ser seg ut Vinny da hun blir avvist av kjæresten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Mike klarer ikke å vente lenger med å avsløre 'sannheten' for Snookis kjæreste. Pauly, Vinny og Deena synes det er vanskelig å være de single i huset.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Alchemist
programme.desc: Catherine has reason to believe that a new drug on the streets is being supplied by someone from Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful attorney seduces Catherine's boss, Joe Maxwell, creating a serious conflict of interest.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Promises of Someday
programme.desc: Catherine is disturbed when she begins to suspect the new attorney in her office is a fraud... and more disturbed when she finds him looking for the entrance to Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Down to a Sunless Sea
programme.desc: Catherine fails to heed Vincent's warnings about her dangerous former law-school beau.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Fever
programme.desc: After Mouse discovers a ship's gold and gemstones treasure buried beneath the city, Vincent's community is torn apart by greed and strife.

programme.title: JAG: Fit For Duty
programme.desc: Harm and Mac find themselves on opposing sides when a Navy psychiatrist is charged with allegedly sending a marine diagnosed with combat stress back to battle too soon.

programme.title: JAG: Death At The Mosque
programme.desc: Vukovic is sent to Iraq to defend a Marine who was caught on tape killing a seemingly innocent Iraqi civilian.

programme.title: JAG: Dream Team
programme.desc: A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot, Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: A woman radar-intercept officer (RIO) disappears at night from an aircraft carrier in the Adriatic Sea. Two JAG lawyers, Lt. Harm Rabb and Lt. Caitlin Pike, investigate and solve. Harm, a former Naval aviator, unexpectedly becomes a hero.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ace Takes A Holiday/ The Runaway/ The Courier
programme.desc: Ace's foot injury sets him upon the path to romance.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Getting Started/ Daughter's Dilemma/The Captain Wears Pantyhose
programme.desc: A young man makes a big mistake about what he believes to be his birthday gift.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Vicki's Gentleman Caller/ Partners To The End/ The Perfect Arrangement
programme.desc: When an older man gives Vicki attention, she thinks it's a sign of potential romance, but his advances aren't actually a sign of affection. Meanwhile, a bi-coastal couple learns that their relationship only works long distance.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Judy Hits A Low Note/ Love Times Two/ The Problem With Papa
programme.desc: A producer of TV commercials casts Judy in a singing spot without first checking out the quality of her voice.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Charmed, I'm Sure/ Ashes To Ashes/ No Dad Of Mine
programme.desc: Ace has mixed feelings when a girlfriend from the past returns in a wheelchair.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: MacGyver: Murderer's Sky
programme.desc: MacGyver protects a 14-year-old from the mob after his grandfather is killed for refusing to sell out his international shipping company.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Secret Of Parker House
programme.desc: MacGyver and old friend Penny Parker uncover a skeleton on the grounds of a mansion inherited by Penny, and MacGyver works to solve a year-old mystery regarding the disappearance of Penny's aunt.

programme.title: MacGyver: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: While visiting his hometown, MacGyver is forced to recall a painful incident from his past when he comes to the aid of a young boy involved in a shooting.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Outsiders
programme.desc: MacGyver is forced to settle a dispute between the Amish and some land developers after an accident threatens the lives of two children.

programme.title: MacGyver: On A Wing And A Prayer
programme.desc: MacGyver and Jack Dalton, posing as arms dealers, infiltrate a Latin American rebel camp where a wounded Pete Thornton is being held hostage.

programme.title: Matlock: The Nurse
programme.desc: A nurse is accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Convict
programme.desc: An inmate kills another inmate in self-defense.

programme.title: Matlock: The Court-Martial (Part 1)
programme.desc: A serviceman is accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Court-Martial (Part 2)
programme.desc: There is some scandal and blackmail in the military.

programme.title: Matlock: The Therapist
programme.desc: A movie star is accused of murdering another movie star.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself in the middle of another murder investigation that hits too close to home.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan finds himself in unfamiliar territory when a string of murders seem to be connected to a state of the art computer system and its not so stable inventor and owner Bruce Locatelli.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Steve return home from a fishing trip to a shocking discovery - the bloody and beaten body of Mickey, the young medical student who, along with his wife Jill, also a medical student, had been house-sitting for them.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve reluctantly goes on a dating game show and wins. Much to his pleasnat surprise, his date appears to be everything he's looking for and more.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve gets an unexpected phone call from Hawk, an old friend from the police force who has recently retired and moved into the Sunny Meadows rest home.

programme.desc: Gutta drar til Connecticut for å se Vinnys første standupshow. Deena tar seg en pizza. Sammi og Ronnie snakker endelig sammen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Romkameratene samles for å lege gamle sår. Ang endrer mening.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Vinny tror han har feber. Jentene tar privatjet for å se Pauly spinne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Tur til bondegården

programme.desc: Etter en dag med ærlig 'arbeid' på bondegården, får gjengen oppleve fra jord til bord.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Lage Barn-Cologne
programme.desc: Gjengen fester i Atlantic City på Halloween. Pauly planlegger en stor overraskelse for Nikki.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Female chef Yoshiko Takemasa is so fastidious that she only cooks fish caught by rods, not nets, to ensure no bruising.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chef Joel Bruant, an apprentice of the emperor of French cuisine, Paul Bocuse, hopes to once again defeat Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef

programme.title: Iron Chef

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Tsuguo Fujiwara, the managing director of the Chinese Chef's Association, takes on Iron Chef Chen in a battle of sea cucumber.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paige Desorbo II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' vil Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Paige DeSorbo unngå å få nesen ut av ledd i 'Neseborsjokk', unngår små, gira råtasser i 'Helvete på plasthjul' og kliner til med noen frampå eldre damer i 'Sugne bestemødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood sparkesykkel-kollisjoner til et høyere nivå med 'Sparkesykkelspark', konfronterer søppeldagen direkte med 'Vanskelig søppel' og snur uhell til hell i 'Utilsiktede seiere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut håret med 'Partyrotter', ler av noen ordentlige 'Krimklovner' og tar en titt på ulike 'Krasjkamera'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood X
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å bære alt i én omgang i 'For mye å bære', slår seg løs på do med 'Båskriminalitet' og er ekstremt galante som i 'De beste kjærestene'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis farene ved stiger i 'Stigekræsj', føler at de må følge fulle venner hjem i 'Fylleleveranser' og oppdager at ikke alle maskoter er like i 'Maskotproblemer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood verdens verste smerter i 'Halebeinbrutalitet', opplever at allergisesongen er ille i 'Naturlig snørrete' og drar langt ut på landet og fester i 'Partylåver'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis mellom snøbrettkjørere og skiløpere i 'Snøkrig', slåss mot sulten på verste måte i 'Nattmatkatastrofe' og sykler på feil trær i 'Sykkel møter bark'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kaster Rob, Steelo og Lexi Rivera seg inn i spillet med noen 'Nattatleter', tar en slumsete drink laget av noen 'Sleivete miksologer' og feirer irriterende forhold i 'Elsker å hate dem'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' benytter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lexi Rivera de bevegelige trappene i 'Opptrappet smerte', møter morderiske barn som muligens er 'Foreldrekverkere' og kan ikke krysse gaten uten å oppleve 'Overgangskræsj'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' fyrer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av noen 'Skliskudd', starter hårete branner 'I fyr og flamme' og krangler om rot i 'Snuskete kjærlighet'.

programme.title: Andromeda: En rose i asken
programme.desc: Dylan er fengslet på en fengselsplanet og må utføre en flukt mens mannskapet hans prøver å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Alle store Neptuns hav
programme.desc: Castalian styrer Andromeda for å fullføre charteret for det nye samveldet. Når lederen blir oppdaget død, er Tyr hovedmistenkt.

programme.title: Andromeda: Perlene som var hans øyne
programme.desc: Beka får vite at farens tidligere forretningspartner handler med et svært vanedannende stoff som heter Flash.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tårenes matematikk
programme.desc: Andromeda oppdager søsterskipet, Pax Magellanic. Mannskapet ombord Pax er 300 år ... men har ikke blitt eldre en dag.

programme.title: Andromeda: Musikk fra en fjern tromme
programme.desc: Tyr krasjlander Eureka Maru på en Nietzschean-planet og utvikler hukommelsestap. Han må huske hva han gjør før Nietzscheans oppdager ham og hans kasse med stjålne varer.

programme.title: Andromeda: Harper 2.0
programme.desc: Harper mottar kunnskapsgaven fra en døende Perseid, bare for å oppdage at Perseid ble etterlyst av en dusørjeger som nå har vendt oppmerksomheten mot Harper.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in your Eyes
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of jobs. Forensic investigators had to determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error, or sabotage.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Police investigate a discarded sleeping bag containing bloody sneakers and a purse, which eventually leads to the body of a young woman. A mark found on the victim's body enables police to track the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dreamy Disappearance, Mom & Pop Murders (Pts. 1 & 2), Mystery Hum, Update: Missing Ex-Monk and Stalker Reward.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Marine Destroyed, Texas UFO, Lacrosse Star Murder, Larceny Lady, Update: Ladies Man and Phillip's Angel.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Sunnyvale Stalker, Missing In-Laws, Calling Dr. Fraud, Incredible Journeys, Update: Social Security Murder and Candy & Roxy.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Daughter Seeks Justice, Butch Cassidy, Pizza Man, Ghost Boy, Update: Amish Hostage Murder and Big Mac Shootout.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dale Disappeared, Beauty Salon Killer, Death & Disappearance and Mom's Genetic Curse.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dying to Confess, Vince Foster, Walk-Ins, Missing Ex-Monk, Update: Thanks Big Brother and Aphrodisiacs.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: Philadelphia, Mississippi, 1964. A sleepy southern town steeped in tradition finds itself targeted for invasion.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Takeover
programme.desc: Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Death Grip
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The Identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Killing Time
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blind Trust
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Double Helix
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Demons on The Buses
programme.desc: Hidden in St Helens, is a museum that is home to demonic and dark entities trapped inside of vehicles.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Not a Very Fun Day at The Beech Caves
programme.desc: Witchcraft, demons and ghosts have all been reported to haunt these caves. Sean investigates this network of tunnels deep underground and uncovers that all is not as it seems. This is not a day out at the seaside at Beech Caves.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Ghosts of The Asylum
programme.desc: Paul and Sean visit one very haunted Asylum in Manchester and come to face with ghostly souls that are haunting the building. The Asylum housed the criminally insane and it would appear, as the building closed, some of them never left!

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads deep into the Pendle Hills in search of the Pendle Witches that went to trial in 1612 and were hung for witchcraft. The investigation takes an unexpected twist with a stop at the New Inn, Pendles most haunted pub.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Pendle Hill and ventures even deeper into the hills. The night takes an unexpected turn with a dramatic ending, which he believes was caused by the witches.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to the town of Morley to investigate the infamous Morley Market. A place once bustling with people from years gone by, it is now haunted by shadow figures, and they appear to want to make themselves known.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex Martin that he fathered her four-year-old. Martin's sister says that the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence. Who's the real father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Bullied Out of School
programme.desc: Aabrea and Jerae bullied a high school girl so badly that she dropped out. Can Steve help them resolve their differences and figure out why so many teens turn to bullying?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Extreme Deception Indicated
programme.desc: Joe and Tammy have been together for six years and they have two children. Joe faces cheating accusations again and returns to Steve's stage for his lie detector results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Think He's Gay
programme.desc: Monique’s friend claims that Adrian advertised himself on a “Gay for Pay” website. Then, pregnant Tyeasha suspects David of cheating on her with men. What will the polygraph say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
programme.desc: On today's Steve Wilkos, will the lie detector results reveal if Tamisha and Simone's men were faithful? Or will it reveal some more sinister results?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The Devastating Truth
programme.desc: Desiaree refuses to believe her sister or mother's accusations against her father. Are their lies are keeping him in prison? Find out today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her ten month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: End of Days
programme.desc: The discovery of a family home littered with corpses tasks Kenda with unspooling the paranoid obsessions of a diseased mind, and forces him to confront his greatest fear.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. Violence
programme.desc: 29yr old Chris is shot in cold blood outside a neighborhood bar. Faced with a trio of suspects, Kenda trusts his gut and makes a controversial decision.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: Kenda encounters one of the most horrendous crime scenes of his career, but his hunt for a homicidal maniac leads him to the most unexpected of killers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. LA
programme.desc: A young man tries to flee a violent scene, but is shot dead behind the wheel of his car. A peculiar clue puts Kenda hot on the heels of a self-styled gangster with revenge on his mind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Blackpool Pleasure Beach
programme.desc: Blackpool Pleasure Beach is one of the most visited attractions in the United Kingdom. People visit it not only for the fun, but to also hopefully catch a glimpse of the many ghosts that haunt there.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Whitby Hall
programme.desc: Built in the early 1800s, Whitby Hall used to be an administrative center and now stands as a public park and arts center. It has never before been investigated, but staff have reported many noises and presences among them.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Pest House and Sleepwalkers
programme.desc: An earthquake triggers terrifying activity in a house with a dark past. A young woman sees visions in her sleep that lead her to an abandoned hospital.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Whispering and Ethel
programme.desc: After returning home for her mother's funeral, a young woman is terrorized by visions from her past. A musician finds a suicide note that reveals the dark history of his new house.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Boy Did It and Frozen Forest
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy claims that his imaginary friend pushed his sister through a second story window. A newly divorced woman relives the terrifying history of the remote cabin she's rented.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: It Watches Me While I Sleep
programme.desc: The suburban house of two young cousins is filled with scary encounters after a demonic ceramic giraffe is brought into their home.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Emperor's Bride
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel er i Moose Bay, Alaska på jakt etter den hvite jadesarkofagen til en kinesisk keiserinne. Sydney støter på andre relikviejegere Dallas Carter og Kurt Reiner.

programme.title: Andromeda: En rose i asken
programme.desc: Dylan er fengslet på en fengselsplanet og må utføre en flukt mens mannskapet hans prøver å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Alle store Neptuns hav
programme.desc: Castalian styrer Andromeda for å fullføre charteret for det nye samveldet. Når lederen blir oppdaget død, er Tyr hovedmistenkt.

programme.title: Andromeda: Perlene som var hans øyne
programme.desc: Beka får vite at farens tidligere forretningspartner handler med et svært vanedannende stoff som heter Flash.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tårenes matematikk
programme.desc: Andromeda oppdager søsterskipet, Pax Magellanic. Mannskapet ombord Pax er 300 år ... men har ikke blitt eldre en dag.

programme.title: Mutant X: Crime of the New Century
programme.desc: En gutt som utvikler nye mutante evner er kidnappet og teamet samtykker i å finne ham til moren sin. De lærer senere at hun var den som fikk sønnen kidnappet.

programme.title: CBS Morning News
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings is a live daily morning news show that is anchored by Anne-Marie Green. Get ahead on the latest news by streaming the most important national and global stories first thing in the morning.

programme.title: CBS Mornings
programme.desc: Reporting on international news stories, interviews, and in-depth pieces, covering topics from news, sports, climate and technology to race, health, parenting and personal finance.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7 Mornings
programme.desc: Få med deg de seneste nyhetene fra CBS direkte her med omfattende nyhetsreportasjer døgnet rundt fra hele verden.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: On the Case: From Dusk to Darkness
programme.desc: After a 10-year-old girl mysteriously disappears, her family and the police undergo a tormenting journey to find a lead.

programme.title: On the Case: A Nightmare in Laurel
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears before her final shift at a Maryland hospital, her family begins a decades-long search for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Riddle
programme.desc: Nine days after 11-year-old Mary Stiles goes missing while trick-or-treating, a letter arrives at the police station leading investigators to Stiles' body; then, investigators must decipher a series of riddles before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: On the Case: The Long Path to Justice
programme.desc: A couple's daily walk ends in murder and a cloud of suspicion descends on the victim's family.

programme.title: On the Case: A Ray of Darkness
programme.desc: Police must connect two vicious murders in order to bring a single killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder Ordained?
programme.desc: When a young minister's wife is found dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. But then, another member of the congregation is murdered. Police begin to wonder if its just a coincidence or a calculated plot.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Last Days
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts. But his over- zealous efforts result in a clash with the crew and with Joe, and a down-to-the-wire midnight departure to meet a deadline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Doghouse
programme.desc: Duane's decision to leave the Electra crew unsupervised while he spends time at home jeopardizes the completion of a major contract, and could cost him his job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Strip
programme.desc: Mechanic Jimmy is sent to a northern mining camp to create an ice landing strip on a remote lake where AJ will have to land a DC-3 and the much bigger C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Expect the Unexpected
programme.desc: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine. High winds wreak havoc for Devan and his crew on another C-46 mission to help clean up an oil spill in the Northwest Territories.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Abbi Jacobson

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Special Forces operate deep behind enemy lines with top-of-the-line weapons.Host Wil Willis tests the Sig Sauer P226, the preferred choice like the Mark 25 by Navy SEALs, against competitors like the H&K Compact Tactical.

programme.title: Secret War: The Scholar and the Fight for Greece
programme.desc: Monty Woodhouse, a professor and a legend for blowing up the Gorgopotamos Bridge in Greece in 1942. In the British counter attack against Rommell at Al Alamein in North Africa it was vital to disrupt German supply routes, Greece.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Seizing Power
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, Hitler capitalizes on economic woes blaming the Weimar Government and Jews. Despite scandals, Nazi rallies gain popularity and emerge as the largest party. Hitler becomes Chancellor in 1933, using the 'Enabling Act' to seize power.

programme.title: Secret War: The Banker, the Norwegians & the Bomb
programme.desc: Sir Charles attended Eton, and then joined the Coldstream Guards. He won the Military Cross on the Western Front and, having survived the war, returned to banking.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Frenzied Killing
programme.desc: Flere mennesker blir drept i 1944 enn noen gang før på Auschwitz. Nazistene prøver å så forvirring blant de allierte i øst, og de vestlige allierte tar beslutninger om å forhandle med nazistene om jødene og bombe leiren.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: iCarly: Nattsynbrillene
programme.desc: Sams venn kommer ut av ungdomsfengselet, og Sam advarer alle om å holde seg unna, men Carly hører ikke etter og havner på dypt vann. Hjemme i leiligheten finner Spencer noen nattsynbriller.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 1
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York. De elsker New York og er kjempeglade for å være med i programmet, men alt kan skje på live tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: iCarly: Den stjålne laptoppen
programme.desc: Når Sams laptop blir stjålet, prøver iCarly-gjengen å hjelpe henne med å oppspore tyven. Imens får Spencer vite at han ikke får komme inn i sin yndlingsspillehall hvis han ikke er i følge med et barn. Hellet snur når Guppy trenger barnevakt.

programme.title: iCarly: Farvel del 2
programme.desc: Carly er på vei til å akseptere at hun ikke kan gå på det årlige ballet, da faren hennes dukker opp og går sammen med henne. Kvelden tar en uventet vending når faren hennes stiller et livsavgjørende spørsmål.

programme.title: iCarly: Vårt eget webshow
programme.desc: Når Miss Briggs avviser alle yndlingsdeltagerne deres fra uttakene til talenshowet, bestemmer Carly og Sam seg for å lage sitt eget talentshow for klassekameratene gjennom iCarly på nettet.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!

programme.title: Cheers NO: My Fair Clavin
programme.desc: Cliff hjelper kjæresten sin med å forbedre utseende sitt, men angrer når hun får oppmerksomhet fra alle kanter, også fra Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Christmas Cheers
programme.desc: Julaften blir en trist affære i baren etter at Rebecca ber alle om å jobbe sent.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Woody for Hire Meets Norman of the Apes
programme.desc: Woody prøver å overbevise vennene sine om at han har fått en rolle i en TV-serie.

programme.title: Cheers NO: And God Created Woodman
programme.desc: Woody tar på seg skylden da Rebecca knuser en vase på en firmafest, og han ender opp som kompis med sjefen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Tale of Two Cuties
programme.desc: Til Rebeccas store forargelse ansetter Mr. Drake en pen, ung kvinne som bartender på Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Yacht of Fools
programme.desc: Evan Drake inviterer Rebecca og Sam til å tilbringe en helg om bord i båten hans.

programme.title: Cheers NO: To All the Girls I've Loved Before
programme.desc: Frasiers utdrikningslag utvikler seg til en dyster feiring.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Let Sleeping Drakes Lie
programme.desc: Rebecca blir tatt på fersk gjerning på Evan Drakes soverom.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Airport V
programme.desc: Carla får hjelp av Frasier til å overvinne flyskrekken. Rebecca venter i spenning på et besøk fra en restaurantkritiker.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap
programme.desc: Beavis starts mimicing Butt-Head / A quiet day in Highland, Texas / Our duo enrolls in a fitness class

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Scared Straight / Citizen Butt-head Part 2
programme.desc: To teach them that crime doesn't pay, Beavis & Butt-head's principal sends them to prison for a day. Bad idea. / Beavis & Butt-head and President Clinton explore chaos theory together.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sporting goods / Cow tipping
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head decide to get athletic gear supporters for gym class / The duo venture out on a quest for cow tipping

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den rare jenta / Tidsreisen
programme.desc: Beavis møter en hemmelig beundrer på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head krysser frem og tilbake over delstatslinjen inn i Mountain Time Zone og tror de kan reise i tiden.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Manners Suck / Pipe Of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen gives his class a lesson in manners that no one will ever forget. He punches out the etiquette teacher. / Butt-head gets stuck in a construction site pipe, a la Baby Jessica.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nyren / Den gode handling
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis ødelegger nyren og en donor fra hans fortid redder dagen./ Beavis og Butt-Head utfører sin første gode gjerning ved å ha DDT i bowlen på skoledansen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head miss the schoolbus home / The duo makes a Late Night Show / Beavis and Butt-Head are invited to play football

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Tak / Elv
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head blir sittende fast på taket av Tom Andersons hus./ Beavis og Butt-Head seiler på dekk i en elv og ender opp på sjøen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Crush / Young, Gifted & Crude
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents. / Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Choke / Career day
programme.desc: Eating chicken can be hazardous / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Fish Tale
programme.desc: Aunt Irma pays a surprise visit to Sabrina, who desperately tries to conceal the fact that she's marrying a mortal.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: What a Witch Wants
programme.desc: Sabrina’s friendship with Roxie and Morgan is put to the test.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Soul Mates
programme.desc: When Sabrina wakes up with cold feet on her wedding day, she hopes a little magic and words of wisdom from her mother and aunt will help.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Pilot
programme.desc: Sabrina’s Sweet 16 becomes a truly magical birthday when she discovers she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Bundt Friday
programme.desc: Under the influence of truth sprinkles, Sabrina learns honesty is the best policy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Terrible Things
programme.desc: Sabrina's good intentions turn bad when she uses her magic to meddle in other people's lives.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The True Adventures of Rudy Kazootie
programme.desc: Big trouble comes in a small package when Sabrina takes a babysitting job.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Geek like me
programme.desc: Popular Libby manages to turn being a geek into a position of power.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Halloween Story
programme.desc: Sabrina faces a frightful dilemma when she must be in two places at once for Halloween.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dream Date
programme.desc: Something’s cooking when Aunts Hilda and Zelda use man dough to bake a date for Sabrina.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Third Aunt from the Sun
programme.desc: As fun Aunt Vesta, Raquel Welch shows Sabrina how the Other Realm half live.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Beauty and the Bank
programme.desc: Alex jeopardizes his career at a bank when he falls for his boss.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Paper Lion
programme.desc: Alex faces a moral dilemma while assisting his professor on a research project.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Skippy is the victim of a cruel fraternity prank when Alex intervenes.

programme.title: Fem i familien: O'Brother: Part 1
programme.desc: The Keatons are devastated when Uncle Rob announces he’s getting a divorce.

programme.title: Fem i familien: O'Brother: Part 2
programme.desc: The Keatons hear the other side of the story about Uncle Rob’s separation.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Battle of the Sexes: Part 1
programme.desc: The Keatons have their own battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Battle of the Sexes: Part 2
programme.desc: The Keatons reminisce about their relationships gone awry.

programme.title: Fem i familien: High School Confidential
programme.desc: Alex tutors Nick to help him earn his high school diploma.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Mother, My Friend
programme.desc: Mallory gets jealous when her friend forms a bond with Elyse.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at kara har en dårlig Skype-forbindelse, en Django Unchained-slavekamp og en baseballspiller som klasker for mange rumper.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Das Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan prøver å gjemme seg for en negerjaktende nazist. Andre sketsjer inkluderer to slaver som sliter med å bli solgt, et par kriminelle som kommer i knipe før et stort kupp.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meagan's Fight
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Meagan vender tilbake, Jordan prøver å se kul ut på en strippeklubb og opptrer med et funk-show.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Aerobics Meltdown
programme.desc: Stan Lee har noen nye superhelter, og en gatesmart fyr mister sin street cred når han opplever en hjernefrysning. Og sist, men ikke minst, utvikler en mann en komplisert minnesanordning for å huske hvor han har parkert.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama College Years
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan befinner seg plutselig i en gjenoppføring av Borgerkrigen, Jesus møter en farlig hallik, og vi får en god titt på president Barack Obama de første årene på college.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MMMMMM
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan opptrer foran et oppstemt publikum, en trafikkreporter blir utsatt for turbulens i et helikopter og halvdelen av en R&B duo avslører sine sanne følelser for sin partner under en opptreden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Power of Wings
programme.desc: Inkluderer sketsjer der Keegan og Jordan avlytter hvite kvinner som elsker svarte menn, Wendell lager en musikkvideo og Kareem og Jahar går på treningssenteret.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Soul Food
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan diskuterer hvem som er mest svart, og å være den eneste svarte på en fest. Sketsjer inkluderer Tea Party som oppdager et nytt håp, hærens ververe som tenker annerledes, og Bobby McFerrin som duellerer mot Michael Winslow.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The 420 Special
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson slapper av hjemme, Keegan må bevare fatningen under et jobbintervju, en skredder får en klient med luft i magen, parkeringsvaktene diskuterer 'Game of Thrones' og en telefonselger prøver en ny strategi.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrorist Meeting
programme.desc: En gangster prøver desperat å bevise at han er gal, terrorister møtes for å planlegge sitt neste trekk og en sjalu storebror gjør familiemiddagen pinlig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bone Thugs And Homeless
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en hund som plager en nyhetsreporter og Harriet Tubman som løper fritt omkring.

programme.title: Broad City: Shenanigans
programme.desc: Ilana rekrutteres som hårmodell; Abbis nye flamme forteller henne at hun ikke er moden nok.

programme.title: Broad City: Sleep No More
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana besøker 'Sleep No More', og Abbi prøver å finne rett tidspunkt for å fortelle Ilana noe som vil forandre livet hennes radikalt.

programme.title: Broad City: Along Came Molly
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana og Bevers selger Abbis eiendeler i New York; Abbi får billetter til en Lil Wayne-konsert, og jentene tar en 'tripp'.

programme.title: Broad City: Broad City
programme.desc: Jentene tar farvel.

programme.title: Broad City: What A Wonderful World
programme.desc: Ilana får nyss om en hemmelig Lil Wayne-konsert. Sammen med Abbi loffer hun seg frem i New York. Jentene lar ingenting hindre dem i å skrape sammen nok penger til billettene. Selv om det blir skremmende, mister de aldri målet av sikte.

programme.title: Broad City: Stolen Phone
programme.desc: Etter å ha prøvd å finne gutter på Facebook, bestemmer Abbi og Ilana seg for å prøve å finne gutter i 'virkeligheten'.

programme.title: Broad City: Working Girls
programme.desc: Ilana prøver å tjene litt ekstra penger i 'temp game'. Abbi lover naboen sin å vente på pakken hans, men hun går glipp av leveransen og må dra til verdens ende for å få fatt i den.

programme.title: Broad City: The Lockout
programme.desc: Når Abbi får sprøytet leiligheten sin mot skadedyr og Ilana mister nøklene sine, blir jentene nødt til å bo på gaten - akkurat når Abbi har sin første kunstutstilling.

programme.title: Broad City: P*$$Y Weed
programme.desc: Jentene må bli voksne! Abbi vil kjøpe sin egen marihuana, som en voksen kvinne, mens Ilana må takle skatten på egen hånd. Og, jentene er høye som hus.

programme.title: Broad City: Fattest Asses
programme.desc: Når Abbi innser at hun er for snill, blir hun mere bitchy. Ilana bestemmer seg for å nå sitt fulle potential. De går på en eksklusiv fest og møter noen eventyrlige DJ-er. Nå kan ingenting gå galt.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Son
programme.desc: While Dangle spends time with a beautiful young man who might be his son, the other deputies enjoy the new department Humvee.

programme.title: RENO 911!: CSI: Reno
programme.desc: The deputies work as security guards when "CSI: Miami" comes to Reno, and Wiegel and Dangle get a homeless man into a bathtub.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Naked Stake-Out
programme.desc: After a drug sting goes wrong, Dangle and Junior race back to the station on foot -- and naked.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel and Craig Get Married
programme.desc: Good news and bad news for Wiegel: her boyfriend proposed, but he's going to be executed for multiple murders.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Pregnant
programme.desc: Did Dangle and Garcia freeze to death? Did Wiegel's serial killer husband get lethally injected? What is Carrot Top doing in Reno, and why is he so mad?

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Junior Bros.
programme.desc: While Garcia goes undercover to bust undocumented workers and the people who hire them, Junior spends his day off with his brothers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Jet Ski Blues
programme.desc: The Reno Sheriff's Department inherits a beautiful, cursed jet ski from a fallen deputy.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Rick's On It
programme.desc: Rick the Citizens' Patrolman one-ups the Sheriff's Department in investigating a crime spree, and Garcia receives a visit from an old, unpredictable friend.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Spanish Mike Comes Back
programme.desc: Spanish Mike Alvarez returns to tempt the deputies, and Jones and Garcia work security at a Ted Nugent concert.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Son of a Chechekevitch
programme.desc: The deputies vow to avenge Sheriff Chechekevitch's death, and Wiegel studies with Lamaze instructor Guy Gerricault.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Make-A-Wish & Fisticuff
programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses
programme.desc: Dave shows what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Black Star.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Samuel Jackson Beer & Racial Draft
programme.desc: Dave debuts Samuel Jackson beer and reveals major upsets in "The Racial Draft."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Negrodamus & The Niggar Family
programme.desc: Paul Mooney introduces Negrodamus, and Dave imagines a black Gallagher.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance & The Three Daves
programme.desc: Dave challenges the myth that white people can't dance.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract & True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Rick James is one of the baddest mothaf**kers of all time.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Internet & Moment in the Life of Lil Jon
programme.desc: Dave walks in Lil Jon's shoes and considers the Internet's sleaziness.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: World Series of Dice & Mooney on Movies
programme.desc: The Marcy Projects hosts a champion shooter contest, and Paul Mooney talks "Gone with the Wind."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: I Know Black People & Keeping It Real Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Dave asks contestants how much they know about black American culture.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tiamat the Dragon
programme.desc: Daniel leker i høsttåken med en magisk drage, avslører den sanne identiteten til Pasadena Piper og tar farvel med sportens dårligste prognosemaker.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Bubble Hat
programme.desc: Daniel takler hjernerystelse-striden, ønsker Amerika en forsinket gratulerer med dagen, og demonstrerer hvordan å grille på lavt budsjett.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 816
programme.desc: Daniel møter alle Bond-pikenes bestemor, finner en bedre bruk for plastflasker og gir ut den årlige Tosh.0 Body Issue.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Three Cheese
programme.desc: Daniel finner ut om en hard kropp har en myk side, beviser at andre kulturers bryllupstradisjoner er like fæle som amerikanske tradisjoner og avslører hvorfor han er den perfekte sengepartneren i nødssituasjoner.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Sex Doll Repairman
programme.desc: Daniel tar et langt skritt tilbake til da han brukte rød og svart tømmerhoggerjakke (med matchende lue) og introduserer en ny spesialstyrkeingeniør-kandidat til det republikanske partiet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 819
programme.desc: Daniel forsøker å få visse av sine ansatte til å bli tøffinger og finner ut om det virkelig er kriminelt å stjele fra de døde.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Where Are They Now? Pt. 4
programme.desc: I sesongens siste episode før Daniel tar vårferie, får han undervisning i livet av en tysk party-prins, går inn på tv-spillmarkedet og tar farvel med tømmerhuggermoten.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Anesthesia Girl
programme.desc: I høstpremieren av 'Tosh.0' finner Daniel ut hvorfor anestesi og mobiler ikke er en god kombinasjon, reiser til Alabama, og deler sin DNA med resten av verden.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Randalin the PAWG
programme.desc: På neste Tosh.0 snakker Daniel med ei dame med stor rumpe, får sine ansatte til å si 'Huh, na na na na', og gir gode råd om å unngå fremmede.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Free Stud Service
programme.desc: Daniel swiper til høyre på nettets mest ettertraktede raring, skriver en liste over verdens verste byer, og setter sammen verdens verste antrekk.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Vengeful father-in-law Mr. Mazzone strips Richard (Malcolm Gets) of all his worldly possessions, forcing Richard to take temporary refuge in Caroline's (Lea Thompson) new office, where he runs afoul of Plum, the no-nonsense office manager.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After Caroline (Lea Thompson) inadvertently offends office manager Plum (guest star Nancy Lenehan, "Grace Under Fire"), she and Richard (Malcolm Gets) are banished to a damp, dark basement office.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After Annie (Amy Pietz) loses her boyfriend, her job and her agent, she impulsively accepts a date with her local drycleaner, Gil (guest star Ken Campbell),and spends an evening to remember.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) decide to go out on their first official "date" together on Halloween, but their romantic evening turns into fright night when Richard gets himself into a rooftop jam.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline stumbles across Richard's (Malcolm Gets) divorce papers in his desk drawer, but an office mishap sends her on a frantic paper chase to retrieve the documents after they are lost in the interoffice mail.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Tired of losing acting roles to other, more well-endowed women, Annie (Amy Pietz) surprises the gang on Thanksgiving Day by announcing that she plans to get breast implants.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard gets an offer that his empty bank account can't refuse: his Aunt Frieda promises to give him $5,000 as a Bar Mitzvah gift if he agrees to finally go through the ceremony.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard (Malcolm Gets) agrees to let Reg become a houseguest after the cartoonist has a fight with his girlfriend, Wanda.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Del (Eric Lutes) experience mixed results when they become office mentors to a young cartoonist with an overactive libido and an eager marketing student.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to take Charlie (guest star Andy Lauer) under her wing and teach him the fundamentals of life after Del (Eric Lutes) is forced to fire the hapless in-line skater from his job at the greeting card company.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We learn more about Linda's upbringing and gain insight into her world after a series of mishaps which led her to quit her job. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie chases a high school fantasy, by reuniting with a high school crush who ends up being a jerk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has an extra ticket to Chicago and Reggie decides to go.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: A friend of and an old friend of Beckers is in town.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker gets shot and Frances Fisher guest stars as his doctor. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Frances Fisher guest stars again as Dr. Elizabeth Carson and reveals to Becker her attraction to him

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and Liz realize that they have a wacky relationship because they both snoop through each other's stuff and Bob wins and loses to lottery tickets.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We find out how Jake becomes blind and watch him begin to come to terms with the accident, his friend, and himself. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts to appreciate life after spending an evening in the morgue identifying one of his patients.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker deals with chaos at work while Reggie studies for a test and Margaret attends the reading of a will. (TV-PG)
