programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Paulie og Mike må sjonglere flere grupper med jenter. Det blir slåsskamp i baren, og en av deltakerne blir slått ned.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Med støtte fra de fleste av de andre er Snooki på bedringens vei. Ronnies familie kommer på besøk, og Sammi ønsker å gjøre et godt førsteinntrykk. JWoww blir lei folkene i klubben og havner i slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: Mike ber jenter til huset, og situasjonen kommer ut av kontroll. Snooki havner i slåsskamp igjen. Ronnie havner også i bråk, og Sammi begynner å tvile på forholdet deres.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Melissa Joan Hart, Trick Daddy, Jewel
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Jewel, Melissa Joan Hart and Trick Daddy.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Redman, Eddie George, Howie Dorough
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Redman, Howie (Backstreet Boys) and Eddie George - NFL.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Chyna, Usher, Tony Hawk
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Chyna, Usher, Tony Hawk.

programme.title: Made: Punk Rocker
programme.desc: Straight-A goody goody, Gracie Moreau wants to get noticed by being MADE into a Punk Rocker.

programme.title: Made: Ladies Man
programme.desc: A dorky, desperate, hygienically challenged senior wants to land his very first date and kiss by being MADE into an irresistible chick magnet. The catch? He has to get a girl to ask HIM out to the school dance.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Condemned
programme.desc: Jim Phelps comes to the aid of a personal friend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Counterfeiter
programme.desc: Destroying a drug ring is the task of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Town
programme.desc: IMF leader Jim Phelps is marked for murder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killing
programme.desc: The IMF sets out to destroy a murder-for-hire organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Phoenix
programme.desc: The IMF foils the attempts of a once-powerful communist to regain power.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: Anne Sofie og Paw har ikke nok plass i den lille Frederiksberg-leiligheten etter en familieøkning. Men kravene til drømmehuset er store, så selv med 7 millioner finner de ikke det de er ute etter.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Jokkmokk
programme.desc: Far above the Arctic Circle, Tareq explores the wild country around Jokkmokk. Here, the Sami people lived from what the land provides for thousands of years. This wild cuisine is as extreme as the weather here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, Åland’s shipping fleet was the envy of navies around the world, and their sea trade was encouraged by the seafood, grains and fruits that thrive on these islands. Tareq prepares recipes to reflect Åland’s unique cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Finland's South Coast
programme.desc: Tareq takes a late autumn trip along Finland’s southern coast. He stops in the capital Helsinki to see how the city's food culture is about to be discovered by the rest of the world, and dives into the freezing waters around Ekenäs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kiruna
programme.desc: Tareq arrives in Kiruna, over 200km north of the Arctic Circle. With the weather getting down to -30C, Tareq takes part in snow picnics, firing up the smoker, and using snow and ice as part of the recipes he prepares.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bergen
programme.desc: Surrounded by some of the most beautiful landscapes in northern Europe, Bergen has become a centre for the finest seafood in northern Europe. Tareq heads into this winter wonderland to see the curious cuisine that has developed in western Norway.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Faroe Islands
programme.desc: Tareq comes to understand what is in the soul of the Faroese, and why their cuisine has developed the way it has. We explore the beautiful capital Torshavn and surrounding villages, and sail into a cave for a recipe prepared on a rowboat.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Central Jutland
programme.desc: Volcanoes and glaciers shaped this part of the country, leaving a giant fjord and pre-historic fossils in their wake. Farmers and food innovators work closely with nature to prepare food with the area’s plentiful herbs and award-winning seafood.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Single Charlotte
programme.desc: Charlotte og Gary nærmer seg hverandre etter at hun kommer tilbake fra et oppgjør med kjæresten. Vicky strever med å overbevise Marnie om å ta jobben på alvor, og klørne kommer ut i en fryktelig krangel.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Marnie & Scott's Mistake
programme.desc: En utekveld i Sunderland ender i katastrofe når Aaron ser Marnie og Scott være litt mer intime enn han kan godta, og gutta skværer opp. Samtidig utvikler Charlotte og Garys forhold seg med stor styrke.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Gary And The Farm Girl
programme.desc: Goerdie-gjengen drar ut på veiene for nok en Tash-On Tour for unge bønder i Gloucestershire. 'Gale Charlotte' vender tilbake når hun ser Gary prate med en annen jente, og Holly og Kyle blir mer intime enn aldri før.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Blue Skull Crew
programme.desc: Gary later som han får en tatovering av Charlottes initialer bak øret, men hun friker ut og sier noe hun angrer etterpå. Dramatikk oppstår mellom Aaron og Marnie, Holly mister tilliten til Kyle, og Gary og Scott begynner nesten å slåss.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Christmas Comes Early
programme.desc: Det er jul i Geordie Shore-huset! Men det blir tårer blant glitteret når Vicky dukker opp med triste nyheter. Kyle håper at han får en julegave fra Holly, og Gaz og Char prøver å løse sine problemer. Seriens siste episode.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Boys' Secret Pact
programme.desc: Herlig! Favorittpartyløvene er her igjen! Charlotte klekker ut en plan når hun hører om pakten mellom Gary og Aaron, men vil det ende med at hun får egg i fjeset? Imens erJames i tvil om han har en framtid i huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Mike klarer ikke å vente lenger med å avsløre 'sannheten' for Snookis kjæreste. Pauly, Vinny og Deena synes det er vanskelig å være de single i huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Meatball Stands Alone
programme.desc: Da Mike forteller Jionni om ham og Snooki, blir det bråk. Deena må takle sannheten om Joey. Noen fra huset drar på camping, mens Vinny og Pauly drar den største spøken i hele Shore-historien!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 502
programme.desc: Her møtes Mike, Snooki, Pauly og Deena og snakker om å komme tilbake til Seaside Heights, og om Vinnys hjemlengsel. Og når gjengen gjennomgår dramatikken mellom Mike og Snooki, heiter det seg til en smule.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 504
programme.desc: Vi møter Mike, Vinny og Deena som snakker om da Vinny kom tilbake til strandhuset, om Mikes forhold til Paula og Paulys forhold til...vel, alle andre. Og vi får en snikkikk på neste episode!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 507
programme.desc: Det er damenes aften og Jenni, Sammi, Snooki og Deena skravler om Jennis kjærlighetstrøbbel med Roger, om kjøttbollegreier og Guidette-problemer. Og vi får en snikkikk på hva vi har i vente.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gym, Tan, Look Back
programme.desc: Jerseygjengen tar et tilbakeblikk på sin reise sammen de siste tre årene. Amerikas yndlingssamboere forteller i intervjuer sine unike historier om uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Og en sniktitt på sesong 6 er med.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Once More Unto the Beach
programme.desc: Alle kommer til strandhuset en siste gang. The Situation forteller ærlig om rehabiliteringen og Snooki må møte den utfordringen det er å være gravid i et hus skapt for festing og moro.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Fever
programme.desc: After Mouse discovers a ship's gold and gemstones treasure buried beneath the city, Vincent's community is torn apart by greed and strife.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Everything is Everything
programme.desc: A Romani boy clears his father's name and regains the love and trust of his grandparents with Vincent and Catherine's help.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: To Reign in Hell
programme.desc: Vincent prepares for a battle to the death after Catherine is kidnapped by a giant warrior.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ozymandias
programme.desc: Vincent's world Below is threatened by a massive tower being built by Elliot Burch, a former suitor of Catherine's. She agrees to marry Burch on the condition that he halt construction.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Happy Life
programme.desc: Catherine and Vincent are forced to question if they could ever be truly happy together.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot, Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: A woman radar-intercept officer (RIO) disappears at night from an aircraft carrier in the Adriatic Sea. Two JAG lawyers, Lt. Harm Rabb and Lt. Caitlin Pike, investigate and solve. Harm, a former Naval aviator, unexpectedly becomes a hero.

programme.title: JAG: Shadow
programme.desc: A civilian tech rep aboard a submarine seizes control of an experimental torpedo after its launch during an exercise

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Three Navy lieutenants die by homicide in 11 months around Washington. Harm and Meg investigate

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Due to a human error in an exercise, artillery fire injures seven Marines, one of whom later dies.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A sailor has stolen two Stinger missiles from a base. Harm and Meg investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot Error
programme.desc: Two Naval aviators die in a crash of an F-14 while using a new fly-by-wire navigation system.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Charmed, I'm Sure/ Ashes To Ashes/ No Dad Of Mine
programme.desc: Ace has mixed feelings when a girlfriend from the past returns in a wheelchair.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Caribbean Cruise: Call Me Grandma/A Gentleman of Discretion/The Perfect Divorce/Letting Go - Part 1
programme.desc: An aggressive woman causes confusion when she's sets her sights on the chaperone of a musical group. At the same time, a young woman changes her appearance to get the attention of the man who wouldn't hire her.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Caribbean Cruise: Call Me Grandma/A Gentleman of Discretion/The Perfect Divorce/Letting Go - Part 2
programme.desc: A stiff British ex-military officer is put in charge of the fun-loving and energy-filled Menudo group; a young couple is confouded because Doc seems very much in love with his visiting ex-wife, a fact Doc attributes to the fact that he is divorced.

programme.title: The Love Boat: A Day In Port
programme.desc: Glamour and dancing feet hit the deck in the season premiere as "The Love Boat" Mermaids join the crew for fun and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Temptations, Joint Custody, Your Money Or Your Wife
programme.desc: Vicki experiences difficulty with the tough manager of the music group The Temptations when she tries to get them to perform for passengers. A loan shark offers a customer a bizarre deal. Also, Captain Stubing becomes involved in a kidnapping.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Physical
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Apartment
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hard Cover
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 2
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 3
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: MacGyver: On A Wing And A Prayer
programme.desc: MacGyver and Jack Dalton, posing as arms dealers, infiltrate a Latin American rebel camp where a wounded Pete Thornton is being held hostage.

programme.title: MacGyver: Collision Course
programme.desc: MacGyver finds himself behind the wheel of an experimental race car after his buddy is injured In a mysterious crash during the qualifying heats.

programme.title: MacGyver: Ma Dalton
programme.desc: MacGyver and Jack Dalton become the target of a kidnapping plot while searching for Jack's long lost mother, who is holding key evidence for a major federal case.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Survivors
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton uncover a drug-smuggling operation while out in the wilderness on a Phoenix Foundation training program.

programme.title: MacGyver: Deadly Dreams
programme.desc: MacGyver matches wits with a killer who has sprung his buddy from the insane asylum cell they share, in a desperate bid to take revenge on the lady cop who put him away.

programme.desc: A movie star is accused of murdering another movie star.

programme.title: Matlock: The People vs. Matlock

programme.title: Matlock: The Doctors

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Marine Lt. Hank Thomas enters BBQ Bob's, the favorite lunchtime hangout of the doctors, wielding a gun in his left hand and threatening three other Marines who are already there.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Paraplegic, asthmatic game show contestant Sol Singer climbs into his specially-modified van and sets out to a TV studio where he is bout to compete on the live quiz show "Through the Roof."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dear friend and famous pop singer Danielle Marsh comes from new York to stay with Mark and Steve while she prepares for a big comeback conecrt.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The murder of a young woman brings Alex into contact with her roommate Amy Saroyan, Alex's former girlfriend whom he has not seen in many years.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Lage Barn-Cologne
programme.desc: Gjengen fester i Atlantic City på Halloween. Pauly planlegger en stor overraskelse for Nikki.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jenni har sin regissørdebut. Gjengen gjør seg klar til sin første internasjonale familiferie på mange år.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Pauly og Nikki drar til Jamaica en dag tidligere for å feire årsdagen sin. Mike har en overraskelse til det lykkelige paret.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Iron Chef

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' fyrer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av noen 'Skliskudd', starter hårete branner 'I fyr og flamme' og krangler om rot i 'Snuskete kjærlighet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood tak i en partner og nyter 'Parskøyting', gjør seg klar til en underholdende kveld i 'Brettspillmiserer' og opplever hvor tøft det er å dele rom med 'Pottesure papegøyer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvilken terrengbåt de helst velger i 'Landjakk', ser på alle måtene barn kan sette seg fast i 'Smårollingfeller' og avslutter med distre folk som er 'Uten romforståelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood i gang kjøretøyene sine i 'Flyktende motorer', vender det andre kinnet til i 'Overraskelseskyss' og hogger i vei med litt 'Økseanarki'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood L
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og deres spesielle gjest Lolo Wood, redd for å få sprøyter i 'Stikkpanikk', får igjen verbalt i 'Ta igjen-attakk' og føler hele dekkmønsteret når de blir 'Overkjørt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Harper 2.0
programme.desc: Harper mottar kunnskapsgaven fra en døende Perseid, bare for å oppdage at Perseid ble etterlyst av en dusørjeger som nå har vendt oppmerksomheten mot Harper.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tvunget perspektiv
programme.desc: Dylan blir arrestert for å ha myrdet en diktator for 300 år siden.

programme.title: Andromeda: Summen av delene
programme.desc: Andromeda styres av en drone fra Consensus of Parts, et mytisk mekanisk samfunn. Mens den først var vennlig, prøver dronen å tvinge skipet til å bli med i konsensus.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt og avsky i Melkeveien
programme.desc: Gerentex er tilbake, og han krever at Trance og Harper hjelper ham med sitt nye opplegg: å finne Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Andromeda: Djevelen tar den bakerste
programme.desc: Dylan og Rev Bem hjelper et fredelig samfunn med å stå opp mot sine kommende slaver, men de må være forsiktige: hvis Dylan lærer dem å drepe, vil barna deres bli født og vite det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Honningstilbudet
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å bringe fred til to forskjellige Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter ved å eskortere prinsesse til den ene til hennes arrangerte ekteskap med prinsen til den andre

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted
programme.desc: A woman is killed while walking her dogs in the woods. Since she has no enemies and her husband has an alibi, police assume it's a hunting accident — until they find a strange letter, allegedly written by the woman before her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: An Alaskan police officer finds a woman's body while on routine patrol of a public park. During the autopsy, the medical examiner preserves the portion of her rib cage which sustained the fatal wound.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delicti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'Em Up
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dying to Confess, Vince Foster, Walk-Ins, Missing Ex-Monk, Update: Thanks Big Brother and Aphrodisiacs.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Undesirable Desiree, Bermuda Triangle, Arlington Murder, Update: Hotel Balcony Death and Rainy Day.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Thomas Drake, Mad Maggio, Viet Pilot's Daughter, Update: Breakout Mom and Missing College Kids + UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Twin behind Bars, Unknown Arsonist, Fugitive Drug Dealer, Queen Mary Ghost Ship and Lucky Lost Love.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: What Happened to Natasha?, Canadian UFO, Kiss of Death, Update: Drunk Driver and Ohio Video Robbery.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 18
programme.desc: This episode includes: Battling for Her Brother, Man Who Never Was, Robbinghood and Life after Life.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Killing Zone
programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Many escape the poverty of India to start new lives in the United States. One turned the American dream into a nightmare. People started turning up dead in New York's Indian community-authorities struggled to link fraud and murder to a powerful man.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The C-11 Squad
programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Double Helix
programme.desc: DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis, another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrived.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Electronic Witness
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Patterns Of Guilt
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Texas Rangers
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Impressions
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to the town of Morley to investigate the infamous Morley Market. A place once bustling with people from years gone by, it is now haunted by shadow figures, and they appear to want to make themselves known.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues the investigation at Morley Market and appears to be followed by a spirit person that wants to touch him and distract him from investigating certain parts of the main hall. Will he uncover who this spirit is?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 1
programme.desc: Four floors of terror! Objects from around the world are at home in the museum, but what is attached to them, which now roams the floors and corridors after dark?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Night at The Leeds Museum Part 2
programme.desc: With activity sending the team into a spin on the top floor, is there something attached to the museum's main attraction, the mummy?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Theme Park - Part 1
programme.desc: What could be haunting an abandoned theme park in Lancashire? Ghost Dimension seek out paranormal activity in Camelot and they are in for a ride!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her ten month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
programme.desc: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her boyfriend Michael because he's allegedly violent. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Statement
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Vanessa reveals a secret she's been hiding from her boyfriend and Joel takes a DNA test to determine if he fathered Melissa's son!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Ever Have My Baby?
programme.desc: Since he never saw evidence of her pregnancy, Robert is here to find out if his ex-girlfriend Sara was ever pregnant with their child. What will his lie detector results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Chose the Molester Over Your Kids
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?
programme.desc: Are Tracy and Latonia's men leading secret double lives with other men? What will the lie detector test results reveal about Kanecha and Mike?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. LA
programme.desc: A young man tries to flee a violent scene, but is shot dead behind the wheel of his car. A peculiar clue puts Kenda hot on the heels of a self-styled gangster with revenge on his mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Collision Course
programme.desc: Two best friends are gunned down on a dark residential street. When a string of disappointments threaten to derail the case, Kenda enlists the help of an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bump In the Night
programme.desc: When a pretty, young pilot is found in bed, bound and with a bullet in her head, Lt. Joe Kenda must determine if this was a random assault or payback for something that happened in the skies.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Man Falling
programme.desc: When a family of four is brutally murdered, it sends a shockwave of fear through the town. Police believe they have a spree killer on their hands, until Lt. Joe Kenda discovers a gruesome connection.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: the corpse of a man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Mission
programme.desc: When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: Cops: Yard Work
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a call of a man shooting a gun in his front yard. Officers are called to a domestic dispute over an wrinkly infant's shirt. Four armed and suspicious men are spotted by deputies.

programme.title: Cops: Keep it Down!
programme.desc: An officer is forced to subdue a suspect with his baton. A man asks deputies to give him back his drugs before taking him to jail. A man causes a disturbance at an apartment complex.

programme.title: Cops: Hot Potato
programme.desc: A man tosses his stash after being pulled over. Officers question two men in a fight who live with the same woman. A man says his shorts are from a thrift store after drugs are found in them.

programme.title: Cops: Nerves of Noodles
programme.desc: A man tells deputies the pants he has on aren't his. Officers are called to the scene of men firing an ak-47. A nervous driver fesses up to the deputy who stopped him.

programme.title: Cops: What's Your Deductible?
programme.desc: Detectives chase a suspect who wrecks his car. Police are called when a man headbutts his neighbor. Officers tend to a woman punched in the face by her husband while on the bus.

programme.title: Cops: Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: A suspect flees police in a truck over a misdemeanor traffic warrant. A man denies hitting his wife who has a bloody nose. A man denies ownership of his shorts when deputies find drugs in them.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: It Watches Me While I Sleep
programme.desc: The suburban house of two young cousins is filled with scary encounters after a demonic ceramic giraffe is brought into their home.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Axe Murderer
programme.desc: An unknown axe murderer still stalks a family he brutally murdered a century ago and then next-door a spirit with a deadly secret haunts a young couple. An off the beaten path bar is stocked with other worldly spirits.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: An Entity in Bed
programme.desc: An entity jumps into a woman's bed and lies down beside her; two sisters' ghosts roam a Civil War-era house; a castle built on an old Indian burial ground is haunted by its original owner; and more.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Van Horn Mansion
programme.desc: Nick tries to contact a spirit to see if she'll reveal her cause of death.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Risser Hospital
programme.desc: Nick investigates why the spirits of deceased patients of the Risser Hospital are becoming more aggressive.

programme.title: Mutant X: Crime of the New Century
programme.desc: En gutt som utvikler nye mutante evner er kidnappet og teamet samtykker i å finne ham til moren sin. De lærer senere at hun var den som fikk sønnen kidnappet.

programme.title: Mutant X: Dark Star Rising
programme.desc: Teamet møter noen mennesker som prøver å bryte seg inn i et Genomex-laboratorium og oppdage at de er feraler.

programme.title: Mutant X: Whiter Shade of Pale
programme.desc: En ny mutant med usynlighetens kraft arbeider mot både Eckhart og Adam, til tross for at hun tidligere var involvert med Adam.

programme.title: Mutant X: Double Vision
programme.desc: En gammel venn av Brennan lokker ham og Emma i en felle. Emma ender opp i to separate enheter, en god og en ond.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel og den rivaliserende relikviejegeren Kurt Reiner prøver å finne den tapte baseballhanske til Jimmy Jonesboro.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Alle som stjeler en statue som representerer den egyptiske kattegudinnen Mafdet, blir drept. Nå er statuen forsvunnet, og Sidney og Nigel har til oppgave å hente den.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: CBS News Live Reporting
programme.desc: Live news and top stories on CBS News.

programme.title: CBS News Latest Headlines
programme.desc: The latest headlines and top stories from CBS News.

programme.title: CBS News Latest Headlines
programme.desc: The latest headlines and top stories from CBS News.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder Ordained?
programme.desc: When a young minister's wife is found dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. But then, another member of the congregation is murdered. Police begin to wonder if its just a coincidence or a calculated plot.

programme.title: On the Case: Hanging By A Thread
programme.desc: Hillsborough County Florida is in the midst of a horrifying crime spree. Young women are turning up dead every week. Can one teen age girl's bravery bring an end to a vicious killer's reign of terror?

programme.title: On the Case: For Love and Duty
programme.desc: After a father discovers his 23 year old daughter murdered in her bed, a dedicated investigator spends more than 30 years chasing her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Darkness After Dawn
programme.desc: After a newlywed is found murdered in her bedroom, a search is launched for the killer that will last for three decades.

programme.title: On the Case: A Knock on the Door
programme.desc: A beautiful young mother is found murdered in the bedroom of her home. The only witness was her five year old son. Would he be able to help police solve the crime?

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Expect the Unexpected
programme.desc: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine. High winds wreak havoc for Devan and his crew on another C-46 mission to help clean up an oil spill in the Northwest Territories.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Coming Home
programme.desc: Rookie waterbomber pilot Scott gets his first taste of action when Buffalo responds to an emergency callout to fight fires in Alberta. Mikey and Rod think they hit the jackpot when they buy a million dollar firefighting plane on eBay at a bargain price.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dark Skies
programme.desc: When Yellowknife and the northern aviation community are rocked by three crashes in the space of a month, Joe places an extra emphasis on safety, which is why he only trusts himself to perform a dangerous-looking DC-3 stunt.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shut Down
programme.desc: Joe receives a negative visit from Transport Canada when inspectors threaten to shut down the airline. Ray and the Electra crew fly to Sachs Harbour to pick up a unique load - the hides, wool, and meat of 250 musk oxen.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Tale of Two Pilots
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Serena Williams
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, 'The Adventures of Qai Qai.' Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News, Bridesmaid Who Went Viral For Eating Wrong Cake
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, Drew helps the bridesmaid who went viral for accidentally eating a special cake for the bride and groom make her wedding wrong right.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Nicole Richie, Super-Sized Drew's News with CBS Mornings Co-Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil, Nate Burleson
programme.desc: "Making The Cut" Judge Nicole Richie updates Drew on her bearded dragon Speedy, the birthday trauma they've both experienced and what it's really like working with Heidi Klum.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: CBS Mornings Co-Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil, Nate Burleson, Dating Tips with Damona Hoffman
programme.desc: CBS Mornings Co-Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil and Nate Burleson join Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk breaking down everything.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Lena Dunham, Drew's News
programme.desc: Lena Dunham on her new medieval comedy film "Catherine Called Birdy." Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News, Stooping It with Sarah T, In A Minute Drew's Memory Bank
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, upcycling expert Sarah Teresinski is transforming items off the street that she found on the Stooping NYC Instagram page.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Guy Branum, Billy Eichner & Luke Macfarlane, In A Minute Drew's News Podcast with Benny Drama
programme.desc: "Bros" star and co-producer Guy Branum joins Drew and Ross at the new's desk. Plus, "Bros" stars Billy Eichner and Luke Macfarlane stop by to chat and play a rousing game of Never Have I Ever with a twist.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "Bros" Cast Ts Madison, Jim Rash & Miss Lawrence, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, "Bros" stars Ts Madison, Jim Rash and Miss Lawrence.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jon Hamm, Drew's News with Bobby Moynihan
programme.desc: "Confess Fletch" star and avid dog lover Jon Hamm plays a rousing game of Pup Quiz with Drew and rescue dogs available for adoption.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Betty Gilpin, Drew's News with Bobby Moynihan
programme.desc: Bobby Moynihan tackles the latest headlines including why 69% of Americans are feeling overwhelmed by their TV & movie watch list, what your dreams are trying to tell you, how which emoji you use can affect your desirability when flirting and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Fat Joe, Nick Kroll
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, comedian Nick Kroll stops by to chat about his new stand-up comedy special, "Little Big Boy."

programme.title: 48 Hours: Arturo Gatti's Last Fight
programme.desc: A report on the mysterious 2009 death of world champion boxer Arturo Gatti. When Gatti was found dead in Brazil, police characterized the death as a homicide and arrested his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Operation Murder
programme.desc: A report about two doctors Valerie McDaniel and Leon Jacob, involved in a 2017 murder-for-hire plot to kill their ex-partners.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dark Side of the Mesa
programme.desc: A report about the 2004 conviction of Michael Blagg for the murder of his wife and daughter. Blagg has steadfastly maintained his innocence and in 2014, in a bombshell decision, the conviction was overturned and a new trial began in 2018.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened in Apartment 4C?
programme.desc: A report on the 2016 disappearance and murder of Joey Comunale after a night of partying in New York City. While out clubbing, Comunale accepted an invitation to a party at a Sutton Place apartment with people he had just met.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Remembering the Chowchilla Kidnapping
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: Cops: Grown Men Gone Wild
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: Cops: Kill 'Em With Kindness
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: Cops: The Fighting Kind
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: Cops: Cell Phone Secrets
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops: Guns, Hash, and Fire Hydrants
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: Cops: Get Off My Roof
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: Cops: This Man Stabbed Me
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: Cops: Blood and Scars, Bro!
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: Cops: My Jewelry's Fragile
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: Cops: Fast Food Escape
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: Cops: Late Night Snacks
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murderous Lovers - Anne Bardot
programme.desc: The disturbing missing case in Paris of 4 years old.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)
programme.desc: On October 31, 2013, Belgian politician Bernard Ouessfal rushed down the six flights of a hotel in Ostend where he had met up with his wife, Véronique, the day before. He had found her unconscious in the bathroom with a mysterious plastic bag next to her

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Jean-Jacques Le Page Case
programme.desc: On the morning of July 24th 2009, a fire erupts at house in Plougonvelin.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Four Lovers For One Crime: The Joël Deprez Affair
programme.desc: On February 5, 2000, two hunters discover a charred body on the banks of the Oise.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 501
programme.desc: Gjenopptakelseskommisjonen har siden 2018 vurdert om Norges mest kjente drapssak skal etterforskes på ny. Skal det endelig lykkes Per og Veronica Orderud å få gjenopptatt saken?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 605
programme.desc: Den 12. juni 2017 blir et eldre par funnet brutalt drept på deres gård utenfor Mantorp. Viktige brikker i puslespillet i jakten på morderen viser seg å være teiprester, så vel som usedvanlig store skoavtrykk.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 302
programme.desc: I september 2003 blir en gutt seksuelt misbrukt av en mann i trappeoppgangen der han bor. Politiet starter en intens jakt på mannens identitet for å få stoppet ham. Samtidig kommer det stadig inn nye meldinger om overgrep.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 402
programme.desc: En sommerdag i 1999 sykler tolv år gamle Kristin Juel Johannessen hjemmefra på vei til badestranda. Samme kveld blir hun meldt savnet. Hvor har den unge jenta tatt veien?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 705
programme.desc: Psykolog Helena Bering forsvinner sporløst midt på dagen den 18. august 2004. Hun har nettopp avsluttet et møte med en klient på klinikken i Stockholm, når alle spor etter henne forsvinner.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 503
programme.desc: I 2007 kommer en mann og hans mor inn på politistasjonen i Bergen for å underrette om at hans kone, Dung Tran Larsen, har vært savnet i en uke. Hva skjedde egentlig med Dung?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trouble with Templeton
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Most Unusual Camera
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Night of the Meek
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag, he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dust
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: What Are Friends For?
programme.desc: A friendless boy finds the perfect playmate in the woods behind his house.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Aqua Vita
programme.desc: Aging women become addicted to Aqua Vita, which will keep them young forever, but at great cost.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Storyteller
programme.desc: In the early 20th century a young woman takes a job as a teacher in a one-room schoolhouse. One of her students, Mica, secretly takes extra books home to read.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Toys of Caliban
programme.desc: An elderly couple keeps their mentally disabled son isolated because he can "bring" anything he sees in a picture.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Back There
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Frenzied Killing
programme.desc: Flere mennesker blir drept i 1944 enn noen gang før på Auschwitz. Nazistene prøver å så forvirring blant de allierte i øst, og de vestlige allierte tar beslutninger om å forhandle med nazistene om jødene og bombe leiren.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: The activities of nations after World War I that lead to World War II.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Killer Police
programme.desc: In Ukraine and Lithuania, Nazi invaders were welcomed as liberators. In Lithuania, Antanas Gecas led a militia that executed hundreds of Jews. Ukrainian nationalists participated in pogroms slaughtering 34,000 Jews in two days.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Gatling Gun, designed to change 19th-century battlefields, now reigns supreme in the skies as a high-speed offensive weapon. With a 150-year legacy of havoc it continues to be a formidable force.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Corruption
programme.desc: I 1943 er korrupsjonen løpsk på Auschwitz-Birkenau. Leiren får også en ny inntektskilde – klær og verdifulle eiendeler tatt fra jøder som kommer for å bli gasset.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Vårt eget webshow
programme.desc: Når Miss Briggs avviser alle yndlingsdeltagerne deres fra uttakene til talenshowet, bestemmer Carly og Sam seg for å lage sitt eget talentshow for klassekameratene gjennom iCarly på nettet.

programme.title: iCarly: Herr Nesten Perfekt
programme.desc: Carly er keen på en gutt på skolen som heter Jake. Han er råkul og kjekk, og fordi hun liker ham, inviterer hun Jake til å spille gitar og synge på sitt nye webshow. Men hun oppdager forsent at Jake synger helt forferdelig.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ha flere seere
programme.desc: Carly og Sam konkurrerer med Freddie og Spencer om å finne den beste planen for hvordan å få flere ungdommer til å se på iCarlys websendinger. Når alle planene deres slår helt feil, blir alt helt sprøtt.

programme.title: iCarly: En pågående kritiker
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie vil at web-showet deres skal bli anmeldt av 'Nevelocity', en populær webside for slike anmeldelser. Carly drar for å møte Nevel, og det viser seg at han er en irriterende gutt som vil date henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil bli hos Spencer
programme.desc: Bestefaren til Carly og Spencer kommer på overraskelsesvisitt. Han tror at Spencer er for uansvarlig til å passe på Carly. Carly og vennene hennes må bevise overfor bestefaren at Spencer er i stand til det.

programme.title: iCarly: Rekordforsøket
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å slå verdensrekorden for den lengste sammenhengende nettvideovisningen. For å klare det, må iCarly gå i over 24 timer i ett kjør.

programme.title: iCarly: En date med Freddie
programme.desc: Valerie er iCarly-fan og ber Freddie på date. Daten går så bra at Freddie begynner å filme Valeries eget webshow. Men når hennes webshow kommer i veien for iCarly, får Freddie problemer.

programme.title: iCarly: En lidenskapelig amatør
programme.desc: Carly inviterer Spencers kunsthelt, Harry Joyner, for å se på Spencers arbeid. Når Harry kaller Spensers ting amatørmessige, føler Spencer at livet har mistet all mening.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarlys største fan
programme.desc: iCarlys største fan, Mandy, blir invitert til showet som enslig studiopuplikum. Mandy viser seg å være mer av en forfølger enn et fan, og de blir nødt til å kvitte seg med henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Kyllinger på rømmen
programme.desc: Carly og Sam starter med å klekke ut kyllinger for et naturfagprosjekt. Kyllingene klekkes tidligere enn ventet og rømmer fra inkubatoren. Nå må Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer finne alle kyllingene rundt om i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ikke krangle
programme.desc: Carly makes Sam en unik iCarly T-skjorte for å markere årsdagen for vennskapet deres. Men når Sam bytter den bort mot konsertbiletter, havner de to vennene i klammeri.

programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!
