programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og medvert Lolo Wood det tøft når de flytter ut og blir 'Såre flyttefolk', møter noen nye medarbeidere som er 'Dumme på jobben' og finner ut at det er greit å gi opp i 'Vi kutter ut'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på trynet i gresset idet de 'Eter plen', blir veltrent og hårete med muskelforbundne 'Gymhunder' og går langt under null i 'Dypfryst moro'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Altfor menneskelig
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka og Trance går sammen med Rommie for å finne ut om et våpen som utvikles på en planet som mistro AI.

programme.title: Andromeda: Una Salus Victus
programme.desc: Andromeda har til oppgave å eskortere medisinske skip trygt gjennom Drago-Kazov-rommet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjemmebranner
programme.desc: En planet av Commonwealth-overlevende ledet av Dylans tidligere forlovede blir invitert til å bli med i det nye Commonwealth, men når de stemmer for ikke å bli med, blir Magog mistenkt for å ha spilt skittent.

programme.title: Andromeda: Inn i labyrinten
programme.desc: En avgrunnsagent prøver å lokke Harper til å bli med i Magog

programme.title: Andromeda: Prinsen
programme.desc: Når de redder en ung prins fra et opprør som dreper resten av familien hans, blir Dylan og Tyr bedt om å være hans rådgivere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Bunker Hill
programme.desc: Dylan og hans nye Commonwealth-flåte tar på seg Drago-Kazov-flåten, men synes den er mye større enn forventet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle was fatally injured in what police believed to be a hit-and-run accident. Tiny clues found at the scene created a picture of the vehicle which struck him and led police to its driver.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search when the mother of two young children went missing. Twenty years after her body was found, new technology recontextualized old evidence and pointed directly to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Tami Lynn, Red Shoes, Laura Outlaw and Missing Time.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Ford's Fugue, Pts. 1 & 2, Edgar Cayce, Missing Theatre Student and Newsman's Lost Love.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Geri, Voice from the Grave, Update: Phillip's Angel, Poverty Island Treasure, North Carolina Nightmare and Miracle Buffalo.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Shelly Loved Horses, Threats and Harassment, Strangulation Saga and Father/Son.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Murdered Heiress, UFO Odyssey Pts. 1 & 2, England Heir, Update: Looking for Christopher and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Target
programme.desc: Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killing Spree
programme.desc: In 1984, in South Florida, a rapist and murderer was on the loose. The killer was a ruthless and terrifying predator, the newest member of an infamous group known as serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Loved To Death
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Betrayed
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives: False Witness
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner's Casebook
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Ghostly Dimension at Ye Olde Boars Head
programme.desc: Sean investigates one of the UK's most haunted pubs, with is very own dungeon. Haunted by multiple spirits, it appears to be very active and Sean is not prepared for what happens to Paul.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Unexpected Haunted Adventure
programme.desc: The team heads to Lydiate Abbey to investigate claims of a ghostly white lady and stumble upon a totally hidden gem deep in the woods, which has its own spirits haunting.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Ordsall Hall
programme.desc: Ordsall Hall is over 820 years old. It has been put to many uses including a family home, working men's club and church hall. With over 15 hauntings and many sightings, Ordsall Hall will certainly keep the team busy.

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Haunted Parade
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters travel to Hoylake and investigate a building known as The Parade. Dating back to 1909, this once former school, still seems to have ghostly pupils and teachers taking class.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 1
programme.desc: Many urban explorers have encountered paranormal activity inside of the building, including child like figures, unexplained voices and strange knocking sounds. Will anything from the ghost dimension make contact?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean investigate Norris Green Mansion. A 17th Century building, which is believed to hold some of the most haunted spirits in Liverpool. Will they make contact its ghostly entities tonight?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: An Explosive DNA Story
programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can he redeem himself?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, Get Him Out!
programme.desc: Kelly’s ex-husband Nikki continues to haunt her. He went to jail for killing her 2 week old son and is now dating her 18 year old daughter! Can Steve get Nikki out of their lives forever?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother in Denial
programme.desc: When ordinary people need help, Steve Wilkos is ready to answer the call. Watch as Steve helps ordinary people stand up for themselves and fight for what he believes in order to promote justice for all.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Now Pronounce You Dead
programme.desc: Mother of 3 Dianne Hood is shot to death by a masked gunman on her way home from a Lupus support meeting. Joe Kenda uncovers a sordid web of lust and greed, revealing a killer no one ever expected.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies’ man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Jeffrey Ortiz, a mentally challenged man with the mental capacity of a nine-year-old, is making himself a sandwich when he inexplicably falls, striking his head on the kitchen counter.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: When the husband, Tao Chen, is shot to death by his wife Jun, she claims she pulled the trigger in self-defense when a drunken Tao came after her with a gun.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: After a brief illness, 34-year old Claire Jackson dies suddenly in the hospital from massive liver failure and winds up in Dr. G’s morgue.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A quadriplegic woman loved by her community is found dead in an Orlando park 150ft from her motorized wheelchair. Children find her lifeless body face down in the sand.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Jerra Kirby, who’s visiting family in Orlando, has suddenly passed out at a theme park wave pool and the paramedics are trying desperately to revive her.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Chris Schaffer has not been seen or heard from in five days. Finally, his friends find him dead and decomposed in the driver’s seat of his van.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Thrilling Gardner Museum Heist / The Ghastly Cleveland Torso Murders
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane examine America's biggest property crime and explore the case of the Cleveland Torso Murderer.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Enigmatic Death of the Isdal Woman
programme.desc: Join Ryan and Shane as they unravel the untold secrets involved in the disturbing murder of the Isdal Woman.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics): Joan Rivers, David Carradine, Scott Baio, Teri Polo
programme.desc: Joan Rivers asks a voodoo priestess to help her with an angry ghost.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics): Barry Williams, Debi Mazar, Greg Grunberg, Sammy Hagar
programme.desc: When Barry Williams holds a memorial service for his father, a few strange "happenings" make the day even more unforgettable; Debi Mazer gets a hostile welcome from a ghost when she moves into a friend's home.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics): Carrie Fisher, Rue McClanahan, John Waters, Federico Castelluccio
programme.desc: Carrie Fisher has a spooky experience after her best friend dies in her bed; John Waters still remembers a scary night in the woods back in the 1950s.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Time Travel
programme.desc: A lawyer and from the Pacific Northwest claims to have been part of a secret government time travel experiment, known as Project Pegasus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rendlesham Forest UFO Incident
programme.desc: Richard travels to England to investigate Britain's Roswell, also known as the Woodbridge-Bentwaters UFO incident, considered by many to be one of the best documented UFO cases on record

programme.title: Mutant X: Interface
programme.desc: Emma gjenforenes med en gammel venninne som har telecyber-krefter. Gjenforeningen blir imidlertid farlig når Michelle prøver å overgi Emma til GSA.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Afterlife and Death
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel er i Kairo, Egypt og deretter Amsterdam. De må slå den rivaliserende relikviejegeren Avery Ko til Farao Thutmoses diamant før den blir kuttet opp og solgt.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel og Stewie Harper drar til Stockholm i Sverige for å finne Runestone av kong Jann I av Norge.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel drar til Dublin, Irland på jakt etter den manglende kronen til den siste kongen av Irland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Ledsager Max tryllekunstneren, Sydney og Nigel reiser til Atlantic City, New Jersey på jakt etter Ungarns tapte og angivelig forbannede Royal Scepter.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: The CBS Evening News team shares the day's stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to the world.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: On the Case: Dreams and Nightmares
programme.desc: An 18-year-old woman is murdered the night before her college career is about to begin.

programme.title: On the Case: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: John Greathouse finds his stepdaughter, Kelli Bailey, murdered in her bedroom; investigators find a video tape and a dead man's forged check and hope these clues will be the keys to bringing Bailey's cold-blooded killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Gone in an Instant
programme.desc: In Lenexa, Kansas, young women disappear from their apartments as police piece together evidence showing the terrifying crimes are connected.

programme.title: On the Case: Blood and Betrayal
programme.desc: A military police officer is found murdered in her own home, sending police on a twisted journey for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: A Betrayal Concealed
programme.desc: A 17-year-old's shocking murder shatters the peace in a small town and destroys her family.

programme.title: On the Case: Scent of a Killer
programme.desc: The investigation into Sandra Iverson's stabbing death goes cold until a police canine team uncovers a trail leading them to an unlikely young suspect.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cold Start
programme.desc: Mikey links up with Chris Hadfield aboard the International Space Station. Problems mount while trying to get a frozen DC-4 airborne. A landing gear collapse on the runway sends the entire crew scrambling.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Snowplane
programme.desc: Joe races a quirky antique snowmobile - with an airplane engine and no brakes. The water bomber crew struggles to get two planes out of Turkey. Cocky rampie Chris Staples tries to prove himself in the C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Lock
programme.desc: A cold snap triggers massive challenges. Devan runs into gear problems while he ferries a mothballed DC-3 across the country. And Justin has to make a snap decision with his newborn son aboard his plane.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Aussie Ace
programme.desc: The Electra returns from repairs and the crew takes it right back to the ice strip that it set off from before the crash landing last year. Tyler works up the courage to confront Joe about a big decision. A hotshot Australian pilot tries to earn a job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Rock Stars and Rampies
programme.desc: Facing Joe's wrath, Rod and Cory head to the UK to make urgent water bomber repairs. David tries to prove himself to Devan in the C-46 but ends up infuriating Devan. Will makes an ultimatum in Hay River.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Chris Freimuth, Drew's News
programme.desc: Horticulturist Christopher Freimuth shares holiday decor tips. Drew & Ross report on E.T. auction & benefits of being in the rain. James Warren talks about building benches at local bus stops.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Queen Latifah, Chris Appleton, Mikel Welch, Drew's News
programme.desc: Queen Latifah shares behind-the-scenes stories. Chris Appleton does music teacher's hair. Drew's News w/ Ross Mathews & Mikel Welch. TikToker Sarah T. shows hack for lamp cords.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jessica Biel, Drew's News with Derek Blasberg
programme.desc: Jessica Biel tells Drew about dog sledding and plays "The Real Biel" trivia. Derek Blasberg joins Drew and Ross to cover news, including Dolly Parton's award and throwback fashion.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Fat Joe,Drew's News with Natasha Leggero
programme.desc: Fat Joe talks about his memoir, "The Book of Jose," with Drew. Natasha Leggero covers news with Drew and Ross, discussing memory after childbirth and "sitter-vising." Fat Joe and Leo Kelly make caterpillars from old socks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: David Duchovny, Drew's News with Kirby Howell-Baptiste
programme.desc: David Duchovny talks about his career and upcoming rom-com with Drew. Kirby Howell-Baptiste joins Drew and Ross for Drew's News, discussing dating and British foods.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Red Flags with Dating Coach Damona Hoffman, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross cover news about a senior dance troupe and a Jet-Puffed marshmallow pillow. Mark Anderson and Ryan Fey make skirt steak tacos. Damona Hoffman and Drew answer red flag questions.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Cameron Diaz, People Style Watch
programme.desc: Drew and Cameron Diaz cook and chat about their culinary adventures. Andrea Lavinthal recreates Drew's past looks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: President Joe Biden & First Lady Jill Biden
programme.desc: Drew interviews President Joe Biden and First Lady Jill Biden, discussing their relationship and Christmas traditions. FLOTUS gives a tour of the White House Christmas Decorations.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Whoopi Goldberg, Drew's News with Matt Rogers
programme.desc: Legendary actress Whoopi Goldbergis here! Actor and co-host of the podcast "Las Culturistas," Matt Rogers is serving up the news sunny-side up with Drew andRossMathews.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Matt Rogers, Holiday Hosting with Pilar Valdes
programme.desc: Drew, Comedian Matt Rogers, and Ross Mathewsare hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdesistalking all about hosting your first holiday.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Katherine Heigl, Drew's News with Katherine Heigl
programme.desc: Drew is chatting with actress Katherine Heiglabout the return of "Firefly Lane" and more.Plus, inan all-new Drew's News, Katherine Heigl joinsDrew and Ross Mathewsat the news desk to hit the headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Dr. Charles Sophy, Drew's News
programme.desc: Dr. Charles Sophyis joining Drew. Plus, an all-new Drew-gooderfeaturing a hero mailman. Drew and Ross Mathewsare serving the news sunny-side upin an all-newDrew's News!

programme.title: 48 Hours: Defending DJ
programme.desc: A report about Danroy "DJ" Henry and the dedication and struggles his family endured while trying to restore their son's reputation after he was shot dead in Pleasantville, New York, by police officer Aaron Hess in 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In September 2005, 17-year-old Taylor Behl, a Virginia Commonwealth University freshman, disappeared from campus. A police investigation eventually uncovered her association with Ben Fawley, a 38-year-old man who confessed to having sex with Taylor.

programme.title: 48 Hours: West Memphis 3: Free
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Joanne Witt was stabbed to death while she was sleeping on Thursday, June 11, 2009. One month prior to her death Joanne found her 14-year-old daughter Tylar Witt in a compromising situation with 19-year-old Stephen Colver.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mystery on Twin Peaks Drive
programme.desc: A report on the December 16, 1998 death of Ronda Reynolds, whose husband found her lifeless body with a gunshot wound to the head in her home on Twin Peaks Drive in Toledo, Washington.

programme.title: Cops: Taser Proof
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: Cops: You'll Shoot Your Eye Out
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: Cops: I'll Raise My Voice Right Back!
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.

programme.title: Cops: We Know Who You Are
programme.desc: Officers respond to a mental health crisis, a man runs from police when approached, and officers recognize a burglary suspect as someone they've tangled with before.

programme.title: Cops: Lady Bit My Finger
programme.desc: Missouri police recover a stolen vehicle, a scuffle between two women at a bar escalates to biting, and a concerned neighbor places a possible domestic violence call.

programme.title: Cops: Familiar Faces
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: Cops: Facebook Fury
programme.desc: A DUI suspect is incensed about being detained, a woman calls police regarding a naked man on her porch, and an eight-year-old girl deprived of social media throws a tantrum.

programme.title: Cops: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: Police track a vehicle leaving a known drug house, officers sort out the facts of a domestic disturbance call, and a daughter trashes her parents' house and threatens police.

programme.title: Cops: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops: The One Dollar Shoe
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops: Getting Funcky
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)
programme.desc: On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Adeline Piet Case
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! What has happened to Adeline Piet?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Dire Deception (Laurence Maille Case)
programme.desc: On November 28, 2007, Laurence Maille disappeared. It was her partner, John Zablevski, who alerted the Vimy police in Pas-de-Calais. He explained that the young woman had left in the morning for a walk with their dog and never returned.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Stabed In Her Bed: The Maureen Jaquier Case
programme.desc: On February 27, 2015, in Toulouse, the parents of 19-year-old Maureen Jacquier discover their daughter stabbed several times in her bed.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 601
programme.desc: Den 14. november 2019 forsvinner sytten år gamle Wilma, og hele Uddevalla blir involvert i forsvinningen. Etter noen dager blir det funnet blod i hennes og kjærestens leilighet, men Wilma er fortsatt savnet.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 701
programme.desc: I september 2020 blir Erik Fasth funnet livløs i en blodpøl utenfor rommet til den funksjonshemmede kvinnen han er assistent for. Politiet begynner umiddelbart å undersøke hva som har skjedd.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 502
programme.desc: I 2016 går politiet til aksjon i en privatbolig på Romerike. På eierens datamaskin finner de harddisker fulle av bilder og videosnutter med seksuelle handlinger fra unge gutter ned i 9-årsalderen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 507
programme.desc: 13. desember 2008 skjer det som omtales som den verste brannen i Oslo siden krigen, i Urtegata på Grønland. Det ble fort mistenkt at brannen var påsatt.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 505
programme.desc: I 1999 brenner huset til Knut Øyvind Moe ned til grunnen i Valdres. To dager senere blir levningene hans hentet ut av brannruinene, og det viser seg at han ble skutt og drept i forkant av brannen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 607
programme.desc: Den 7. april 2017 var Stockholm den neste i rekken av hovedstader som ble utsatt for terrorhandlinger. I denne episoden følger vi politiets ekstremt intense jakt på terroristen Rakhmat Akilov.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Distance Call
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: 100 Yards over the Rim
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Rip Van Winkle Caper
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Curious Case of Edgar Witherspoon
programme.desc: A woman tries to get her Uncle Edgar committed, believing that he is senile. The investigating doctor finds Edgar living in an apartment containing all kinds of junk.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Extra Innings
programme.desc: Ex-baseball player Ed Hamler, lame from an injury and forced to retire early is given a 1909 baseball card of a player that looks exactly like him. The card is magical in that he becomes drawn into it and lives out the life of the player in the past.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Crossing
programme.desc: A stressed-out priest repeatedly encounters a station wagon containing a young girl. The car keeps crashing and bursting into flames.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hunters
programme.desc: A young boy falls into an undiscovered cave near a housing project. An archeologist studies strange paintings on its walls and then bizarre things begin to happen. Cave items move around and animals are killed and brought into the cave.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Silence
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shadow Play
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Maisie Williams Shivers Uncontrollably While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Maisie Williams is an Emmy-nominated actress and star of "Game of Thrones."

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Jonas Brothers Burn Up While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Jonas Brothers kick off a new season with more guests and more wings than the table has ever seen.

programme.title: Hot Ones: DJ Snake Reveals His Human Side While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: You might not recognize DJ Snake walking down the street, but once you hear his discography, the lights go.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Elizabeth Olsen Feels Brave While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Elizabeth Olsen is an actress from "Wind River," "Ingrid Goes West" and the Marvel Cinematic Universe.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: James Corden is the Emmy-winning host of "The Late Late Show with James Corden."

programme.title: Hot Ones: Bob Saget Hiccups Uncontrollably While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Bob Saget became a household name on the classic sitcom "Full House" as well as a legend on the standup stage.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Rhett & Link Hiccup Uncontrollably While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Comedy duo Rhett and Link are among the most requested "Hot Ones" guests of all time!

programme.title: Hot Ones: Will Ferrell Deeply Regrets Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Will Ferrell is a comedy icon with a storied career in TV and film that spans decades.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Thundercat Relives a Hot Sauce Nightmare While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Thundercat is a Grammy Award-winning musician, producer, singer and songwriter.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Built with the pioneering use of steel-wire support cables, the Brooklyn Bridge became an instant symbol of American pride; rare photographs and behind-the-scenes stories recall the politics, the struggles, and the tragedies that made it possible.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Data lines; power; plumbing; photovoltaics; conserving energy; painting; carpeting; moving furniture; lights.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A pilot who builds his own jet-powered glider; canoe makers in Montana; a knife maker in Washington; craftsmen keep alive the ancient art of weapon making; Skulls International in Oklahoma City; handmade special effects.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Targeting the historical trajectory of bullets, ranging from their origins in the 1300s as stones and lead balls to the "safe" and "smart" bullets of today.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Examining how frequently experts in various disciplines can hit their targets, including archers, sharpshooters and even a billiards player; the ancient world's ballista and trebuchet weapons; knife thrower; Cirque du Soleil's daring artists.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: It's the unsung essential of modern life; canning is the method of preserving and packaging food, without which civilization would never have ventured beyond the local food supply.

programme.desc: Reis verden rundt med Jeremy Wade, kjent forfatter, sportsfisker og biolog, mens han leter etter de mest skremmende ferskvanns skapninger i River Monsters. Bli hekta på de største fiskehistoriene døgnet rundt på River Monsters på Pluto TV!

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Surprising Beginnings
programme.desc: Tyske kommandører oppdager effektiviteten i å gasse fanger, og Auschwitz forvandles fra en liten bakgårdsleir for de som motarbeider den nazistiske okkupasjonen av Polen, til en storstilt utryddelsesleir for jøder.

programme.title: Secret War: Christine Granville
programme.desc: Christine Granville, aka Krystyna Skarbek, a brave SOE agent, secured the release of captured comrades from the Gestapo before Operation Dragoon, earning the George Medal.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Dutch Collaborator
programme.desc: Anton Adriaan Mussert, initially resisted Hitler’s anti-Semitism despite modeling his NSB party, even welcoming Jewish members. His failed attempt to kidnap Queen Wilhelmina led him into hiding, after which he collaborated in hopes of gaining power.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Orders and Initiatives
programme.desc: Höss håndterer komplikasjoner som oppstår fra det midlertidige gaskammeret og økende etterspørsel ettersom nazistene begynner å feie hele Europa for flere mennesker å ta med til Auschwitz og drepe.

programme.title: Signs of Evil - The Runes of the SS
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS stands for terror and the murder of millions. Documentary about the history of a symbol that represents murder.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Kysset
programme.desc: Sam overhører Freddie fortelle Carly at han aldri har kysset en jente, og avslører hemmeligheten hans på netshowet. Gibby og Carly trener Spencer til utttaket for det lokale, profesjonelle fotballaget.

programme.title: iCarly: Bilbråk
programme.desc: Gjengen holder en konkurranse på iCarly, og premien er en ny bil fra en lokal forhandler. Etter at Nevel vinner, oppdager barna at forhandleren ikke visste noe om konkurransen eller bilen de skulle ha donert bort som premie.

programme.title: iCarly: Fred
programme.desc: Freddie sier offentlig at han ikke er fan av internettsensasjonen Fred, noe som får Fred til å meddele at han skal slutte å legge ut filmer for alltid. Fansen blir rasende fordi Freddie har forårsaket slutten på de populære filmene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dobbelt opp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie sniker seg ut for å dra til en MMA-kamp, får de sine dobbeltgjengere til å lure Spencer til å tro at de fortsatt er hjemme. Imens bygger Spencer en kjempeversjon av Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly: Om hva for noe?
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie oppfordrer iCarly-fans til å stemme på David Archuleta i "Amerika Sings", syns de synd på nummer to og hjelper ham med å lage en musikkvideo.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skal gjøre Sam jentete
programme.desc: Da Sam innrømmer at hun liker en gutt på skolen, lærer Carly henne hvordan hun kan lokke ham til seg ved å oppføre seg mere feminint. Spencer er overbevist om at en jente liker ham pga. smokingen hans, så han går med den hele tiden.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 1
programme.desc: Når Carly dater er en tøffing, prøver hun å holde forholdet skjult for Spencer. Og Sam betaler Freddie for å lage en hjemmeside der hun kan legge ut alle sine ekle videofavoritter.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjenforening med Missy
programme.desc: Da Carlys gamle venninne Missy flytter tilbake til Seattle, tror Sam at Missy prøver å skifte henne ut som Carlys bestevenninne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg må ha skap 239
programme.desc: Når Sam og Freddie begge to vinner konkurransen for skolens beste skap, slir de nødt til å dele skap. Carly ber Spencer gi henne timer i billedkunst.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly utdelingen
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie holder en iCarly-galla for de beste bruker-bidragene i iCarly, og hyller pristagerne live på web-showet. Spencer verver europeiske badedraktmodeller for å hjelpe ham å lage premiestatuettene.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.desc: Egos soar out of control when Sabrina uses magic to become a rock star.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: When Teens Collide
programme.desc: When Sabrina switches personalities with Libby, she uses her magic and newly found popularity.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: My Nightmare The Car
programme.desc: A talking car causes Sabrina a big headache.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Really Big Season Opener
programme.desc: Miles decides to make a student film in his favorite genre, horror, and enlists Sabrina as the producer of his film.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Date with Destiny
programme.desc: Sabrina and her friends return to school and a lot of excitement after summer break.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Father Time (Part 2)
programme.desc: Uncle Rob’s daughter can’t cope with his divorce.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The American Family: Part 1
programme.desc: Lauren writes a paper on the Keaton family for her class.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The American Family: Part 2
programme.desc: Lauren writes a paper on the Keaton family for her class.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Play's The Thing
programme.desc: Steven gets jealous of Elyse’s leading man in a local play.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Miracle In Columbus
programme.desc: A bearded visitor turns Alex into a believer at Christmas.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Blues, Brother
programme.desc: Alex tries to help a struggling musician regain his fame.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Spirit Of Columbus
programme.desc: Alex turns Nick into an assembly line artist.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Read It And Weep (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jennifer fights the school for banning a book.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Read It And Weep (Part 2)
programme.desc: Jennifer faces the music after reading a book that the school banned.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Job Interview
programme.desc: Dommer Jessie har et nytt program, en mann venter på et jobbintervju, to damer sludrer, parkeringsvakter diskuterer Val Kilmer, en pensjonert mann fra hæren hører om et nytt prosjekt og en kvinne introduserer sin forlovede for foreldrene.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Gang Stand-Off
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer gangstere som er gale etter 'Twilight,' besøk i en verden der navn er promper, og rasistiske superhelter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan & Andre Break Up
programme.desc: To venner kommer i klammeri på en klubb, Meegan og André har en seriøs samtale, en rapper går fra et intervju, Conrad flyr business class og Keegan har en ny bart.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Country Music
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Steve Jobs' efterfølger, Ice-T, som en uoppdragen valp og Rihanna og Chris Brown prøver igjen.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Branding
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan utforsker opplevelsen som sort collegestudent og snylterne som suksess medfører. Andre sketsjer inkluderer et nabolags reaksjon på et mystisk vesen, når man kan - og ikke kan - si et kontroversielt ord.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Alien Imposters
programme.desc: Romvesener invaderer jorden, en familie forliker seg med en slektnings homobryllup og noen rasister gir uttrykk for noen overraskende meninger.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Boarding Group One
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan ikke får lov å gå om bord i flyet sitt, en bølle som nekter å helle ut innholdet i spritflaska og en bokser som sviner til modstanderen sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sexy Vampires
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en uhyggelig asiatisk spøkelsessamboer, kara ser på den lyse siden av tortur og Keegan opplever et hus fullt av sexy vampyrer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Airplane Showdown
programme.desc: En flyvert må håndtere en passasjer som ikke vil ha på sikkerhetsbeltet, britiske oppdagelsesreisende diskuterer sine reiser, to par forsøker å unngå spoilere på en dobbeltdate og en bibelgruppe opplever en guddommelig intervensjon.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MC Mom
programme.desc: En gangster deltar i et skuddrama, en mor skriver en sang til sønnen sin, to bondefangere konkurrerer, Big Boi møter André 3000 og to karer kommer ut for en bilulykke.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Scariest Movie Ever
programme.desc: En vampyr avslører seg selv, en seriemorder blir forhindret og et barn får ønsket sitt oppfylt.

programme.title: Broad City: Bed Bugs
programme.desc: En fancy ny veske gir Abbi tillit under arbeidsledigheten. Ilana og Jaimé må ta tak i et uunngåelig New York City-mareritt.

programme.title: Broad City: Friendiversary
programme.desc: Jentenes 'Friendiversary' utvikler seg i en farlig retning når de blir vitne til noe forferdelig.

programme.title: Broad City: Stories
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana farer fra toppen av Manhattan til bunnen for å feire Abbis 30-årsdag, og treffer på både gamle og nye venner på veien.

programme.title: Broad City: Shework and S**t Bucket
programme.desc: Ilana gir seg i kast med sin seneste mulighet til å tjene penger da hun en åpner et utendørs kontorlandskap for New Yorks røykere; Abbi konfronterer husverten sin da han nekter å modernisere sanitæranlegget hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bitcoin & the Missing Girl
programme.desc: Ilana besøker en gammel flamme for å få sin del av en Bitcoin-formue; Abbi glemmer klesvasken sin for første gang, og mister favorittgenseren sin.

programme.title: Broad City: Make the Space
programme.desc: Ilana oppdager en skremmende hemmelighet om Jaimé; Abbi prøver å avansere fra genserbretter til vinduskunstner på Anthropologie.

programme.title: Broad City: Artsy Fartsy
programme.desc: Abbi inviteres til et fancy kunstarrangement på MoMA; Ilana og Lincoln analyserer det første året de har vært sammen.

programme.title: Broad City: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Jentene møter Ilanas femtenmenning, som overlevde Holocaust, og tar ham med på en kjedelig brunch; Abbi prøver en ny look.

programme.title: Broad City: Shenanigans
programme.desc: Ilana rekrutteres som hårmodell; Abbis nye flamme forteller henne at hun ikke er moden nok.

programme.title: Broad City: Sleep No More
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana besøker 'Sleep No More', og Abbi prøver å finne rett tidspunkt for å fortelle Ilana noe som vil forandre livet hennes radikalt.

programme.title: Broad City: Along Came Molly
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana og Bevers selger Abbis eiendeler i New York; Abbi får billetter til en Lil Wayne-konsert, og jentene tar en 'tripp'.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Digging with the Murderer
programme.desc: Dangle and Williams haggle with a serial killer to get him to reveal where he buried his victims.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Murder Mystery, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Dangle invites the gang to a Reno's Sierra Historical Society dinner -- and a murder.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Murder Mystery, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Who murdered Debbie Dangle, and how does her death tie into the deputies' sordid past?

programme.title: RENO 911!: We Don't Want the Pope
programme.desc: The deputies provide the pope's advance scouting team with an extensive tour of Reno's seedy side.

programme.title: RENO 911!: VHS Transfer Memory Lane
programme.desc: Rizzo and Wiegel pervert-proof the Washoe County Library computers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Helping Mayor Hernandez
programme.desc: When Mayor Hernandez calls for help, the Sheriff's Department leaps into action, even if he just needs to get rid of a violent prostitute in his hotel room.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Getaway Trailer
programme.desc: Wiegel and Rizzo get to know each other better while trapped in a fleeing criminal's mobile home.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Stoner Jesus
programme.desc: A drug-addled touring company of "Jesus Christ Superstar" causes trouble in Reno.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Deputy Dance
programme.desc: Levon French, the king of Reno commercials, helps the deputies make a new recruiting ad.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Viacom Grinch
programme.desc: Declan and Junior crack down on knockoff Nickelodeon toys, ruining kids' parties across Reno.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon & Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how recent events would have played out if President Bush were black; special guests Jamie Foxx, Lil John, and music from Outkast's Big Boi.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy & Clayton Bigsby
programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School & Wrap It Up Box
programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped & It's a Wonderful Chest
programme.desc: Dave screens his failed reality TV show and shares outtakes from "Roots."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Reparations & NY Boobs
programme.desc: Great New York boobs get awards, and Dave predicts reparations chaos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Great Moments in Hookup History & Ask a Black Dude
programme.desc: With time running out, Martin Johnson has one last stab at glory: Ashley "Smashly" Evans.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World & Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines a "Real World" season with an all-black cast and one super-white guy.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Real Movies & Wu-Tang Financial
programme.desc: Dave takes a realistic look at "Pretty Woman" and "The Matrix" and introduces the Wu-Tang Clan's new financial consulting firm.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums's Intervention & Racist Hollywood Animals
programme.desc: Tyrone mistakes an intervention for a crack sale, and "Frontline" covers racist animals.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla & Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tosh.Oh That's What They're Up to Now Part 5
programme.desc: Å dekke en mann i kanel viser seg å være en elendig ide, en begravelse får rave-behandling og Daniel tar en gjensyn med Nettgjenoprettelse-mottagerne fra tidligere år.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Zakar Twins
programme.desc: Daniel møter eneggede tvillinger som deler en stor porsjon broderkjærlighet, kontakter sin favoritt-lærkule-tipser og beviser at enkelte antrekk er for tåpelige til å gå med, selv for ham.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Chop and Steele
programme.desc: Daniel ser nærmere på et digert treningsbedrageri og tar farvel med sommeren med en siste tur på tauhuska.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tourette's Comedian
programme.desc: Daniel møter en komiker som er grov i munnen, demonstrerer hvorfor det ikke bare er barn fra 1940-tallet som kan leke med klinkekuler og avslører hvilke kjendiser som trakk det korteste strå i Hollywood.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Spidergirl
programme.desc: Daniel møter en vågal ung dame og utnytter drone-teknologi.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Nino Brown
programme.desc: Daniel oppdager at ketchup ikke bare passer til pommes frites lenger, og oppfordrer fansen til å la lillefinger-neglen gro.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Poppa Pipes
programme.desc: Daniel lærer hemmeligheten bak en manns enorme triceps og gir makt til menn på Instagram.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Lactatia
programme.desc: Daniel gleder seg til Halloween og lurer alle til å se grusomme operasjonsvideoer.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Mississippi State Fan
programme.desc: Daniel tar en titt på college football, blir begeistret for eplesesongen og prøver å få pengerulling til å gjøre ham til helgen.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Afro Ninja
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby, blant annet Afroninjaen, komikeren Dave Attell og pornostjernen Bree Olson.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Miss South Carolina
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby, blant annet Miss Teen South Carolinas nettoppreisning og David Koechners kjendisvideo.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard's dream of being a paid artist comes true when he is commissioned to paint a mural for New York City.

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Another side of Caroline's artistic expression -- her dream of being a ballerina -- is revealed when she is locked in a laundromat overnight with a homeless man.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Joe's romance takes a nosedive when his ex-girlfriend Lisa returns from her Greenpeace mission and seeks shelter at Joe's apartment.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's sister Donna visits New York in hopes of resurrecting her career, she finds the love letter Richard hid from Caroline and decides that setting the lyrics to music could be her next big hit, forcing Richard to feel slightly off-key.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Del brings one of Richard's paintings to a posh country club to impress a girl, but the best impresssion is made on a wealthy socialite, much to Richard's delight.

programme.title: Caroline in the City

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: Det er klart for sesongens første parseremoni. Spillet er i gang for fullt og slue planer legges. En mystisk gjest sjekker inn på Perla.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Mayoo har inntatt rollen som rektor mens inspektøren følger nøye med i det parene må opp til eksamen. Hvilken jente blir satt i fare som følge av manglende kunnskap?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: En upopulær handling under eksamen skaper splid i den ene alliansen. De «dummeste» på hotellet skal på date med den nye jenta, som må ta et vanskelig valg.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Skolen er ikke for alle og eksamensstresset fører til eksplosiv stemning på festen. Pass på hva du sier bak andres rygg, for du vet aldri hvem som sitter på makten på Paradise Hotel.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 905
programme.desc: Iselinn og Ron er helt uenige om hvor de vil bo. Klarer Karianne å løse en tilnærmet umulig oppgave? Gårdsguttene Kim og Ole Johnny er på jakt etter et idyllisk gårdsbruk med skog og egen strandlinje.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 906
programme.desc: Karianne får et viktig oppdrag med å hjelpe alenemamma Samia i hus før mammapermisjonen er over – men holder budsjettet? Hans Christian møter Johanna og Joakim som er på jakt etter drømmehagen.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1001
programme.desc: Ingrid bor på leilighetshotell med sine to barn, og er desperat etter å få en ny start, og skape et hjem sammen med familien. Småbarnsforeldrene Toril og Eivind vil ut av leiligheten sin i Oslo-gryta.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1002
programme.desc: Lise og Damien blir snart tobarnsforeldre og vil ut av bykjernen og ned på bakkeplan. Cecilia starter i ny jobb i Trondheim om to uker, men har ikke hatt tid til å gå på visninger.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1003
programme.desc: Ole Jørgen og Gina er førstegangskjøpere på begrenset budsjett, og drømmer om en fredfull og landlig enebolig til seg og kattene. Oda og Simon har noen spesielle utfordringer med sin nåværende bolig.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 408
programme.desc: Det er tid for valg og konkurranse på Camp kulinaris. Lothe skal velge førstelærling og det står mellom tre stykker. I dagens lærlingkamp blir deltakerens smaksløker satt på prøve.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 204
programme.desc: Det er konkurransedag på Camp Kulinaris, og en deltaker må reise hjem. Både Erlend og Tommy føler seg utsatt.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 618
programme.desc: Deltakerne begynner å kjenne at mange uker på kjøkkenet tærer på kroppen. Selv om de er inndelt i lag bestemmer de seg for å samarbeide, men hva mener Kjartan om det?

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 532
programme.desc: Det er kun tre deltakere igjen på Camp Kulinaris. To krevende konkurranser står mellom dem, og en plass i selve finalen.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 520
programme.desc: Det er konkurransedag på Camp Kulinaris. De to tapende lagene fra gårsdagens servering får testet samarbeidet sitt i en kaotisk lærlingkamp.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 905
programme.desc: Svein får hjelp av det fastboende kunstnerparet Tara og Rune, da han trenger inspirasjon til sin kommende reisetips-bok, mens damene fra Buskerud tester ut hotellets fasiliteter.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1105
programme.desc: Harstad-familien fortsetter på den strabasiøse grotteturen sin. Haider går selvsikkert inn som kaptein på det åpne hav. Jane og gjengen ankommer Gran Canaria, mens Cathrin og Odin prøver seg på minigolf.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1010
programme.desc: Fred Åge og kameraten Sven Erik tar turen til en fjelllandsby, hvor de møter Bjørge og Tove. Gjengen fra Radio Kvinesdal ankommer, og første radiosending går ikke helt som planlagt.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1312
programme.desc: Pensjonistene nyter en hyggelig middag på den lokale yacht-klubben, mens Harstad-familien leier bil og legger ut på en liten shoppingrunde, klare for å prute seg til gode kupp.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1107
programme.desc: Fred Åge og Monsen ankommer Tenerife. Svein og Lillian får hemmeligheter avslørt hos en spåkone. Gutta i Radio Kvinesdal koser seg på romantisk date. Lars får sjansen til å vise frem sine kjøreegenskaper.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 508
programme.desc: Kalde netter i lavvo og et iskaldt bad under isen er noe av hva du kan se fra Skogn i Trøndelag. En gammel folkehøyskolehytte blir omgjort til familiehytte, og gutta gjør en drastisk omrokkering.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 509
programme.desc: Et gammelt gårdstun fra 1800 tallet på Oppdal i Trøndelag pusses opp. Den gamle bygningen moderniseres uten å fjerne den gode sjelen og følelsen.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 510
programme.desc: Ole, Gustav og Halvor pusser opp hver sin rorbu på Træna i Nordland. Her bobler konkurranseinstinktet opp til overflaten, da eierne skal kåre hvilken rorbu de liker best.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 601
programme.desc: Halvor, Ole og Gustav tar turen til øya Fårnøtt i Skjeberg, hvor de møter Deborah og Nils og resten av familien. Gutta forvandler en malplassert fjellhytte til et lyst og skandinavisk paradis ved sjøen.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 602
programme.desc: Denne gangen går turen til Tannsjøen i Nord-Odal, der søstrene Kristine og Mari har tatt over en gammel tømmerhytte. Her blir gjengen utfordret på å bygge eget kjøkken, og ett soverom blir til to.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 603
programme.desc: I den lille havnebyen Stavern i Larvik møter vi familien Brekke. Her er det uteområdet som står i fokus. En overgrodd og sjelløs hage gjøres om til en grønn oase med mange soner for enhver aktivitet.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2504
programme.desc: Begjæring om tvangssalg ligger i postkassen til Sverre, og han bruker regninger til å fyre i peisen med. Sverre har valgt å gå på byen i stedenfor å ferdigstille huset som han nå står i fare for å miste.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2505
programme.desc: Daniel drikker 3 liter cola om dagen og gamle forbrukslån står i veien for at han og Mona kan etablere seg. Det Mona tror er uskyldig tipping viser seg å være ganske mye mer omfattende.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2506
programme.desc: Ulrik har tatt opp store forbrukslån for å etablere seg med familie. Lånene er ute av kontroll og han får en ubehagelig overraskelse når ekspertene ankommer. Ulrik har også en hemmelighet som avsløres.

programme.title: Luksusfellen
programme.desc: Madeleine elsker interiør, og klesskapet hennes bugner av nyinnkjøpte klær. Når Madeleine vil ha noe nytt så kjøper hun det. Hun lever over evne, og de dyre forbrukslånene hennes hoper seg opp.

programme.title: Luksusfellen
programme.desc: Robin kaster bort alle pengene på dyre hobbyer. Det har akkurat blitt slutt med Madeleine fra forrige episode, og med sin skyhøye gjeld og heftige forbruk er den nye hverdagen vanskelig.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2603
programme.desc: Bibbi er sykepleier og snart pensjonist, men med hennes gjeld vil hun ikke kunne gå av som 67-åring. Huset er fullt av klær, smykker og tomme champagneflasker. Vil hun klare å legge om livsstilen?

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Tannfe 2000
programme.desc: Cartman får 2 dollar av tannfeen, så guttene begynner å trekke tenner for å få råd til en ny spillkonsoll.

programme.title: South Park: Danser med smurfer
programme.desc: Cartman får endelig utløp for sin giftighet når han blir valgt til skolens morgenannonsør og helt skamløst utnytter sin nye stilling.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: South Park: Rumpeburgere
programme.desc: Stans eksistensielle livskrise fortsetter, og Cartman går inn i burgerbransjen med en superspesiell hemmelig ingrediens.

programme.title: South Park: Supermoro utflukt
programme.desc: Barneskolen i South Park har sendt Mr. Garrisons 4.klasse ut på ekskursjon til Pioneer Village, en historisk utstillingsby der alle ansatte går rundt og later som om de er i 1864.

programme.title: South Park: Cupid Ye
programme.desc: Cartman er sjalu på vennskapet mellom Kyle og Tolkien og bestemmer seg for å gjøre noe med det.

programme.title: South Park: Kanada streiker
programme.desc: Canada befinner seg på randen av sammenbrudd etter en langvarig streik for å få 'litt av de internettpengene'.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher knuller en gutt
programme.desc: Cartman er ordenselev og oppdager at en lærer har kysset en elev i hans jurisdiksjon.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 236
programme.desc: Finale – og det er klart for den ultimate troskapstesten!

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 201
programme.desc: Åtte forventningsfulle deltagere sjekker inn i Paradis, men det er fortsatt plass til flere …

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 202
programme.desc: Det er andre dag i paradis og noen vennskap begynner allerede å slå sprekker. Hva gjør det med gruppen når en ny gjest sjekker inn?

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 203
programme.desc: Det er én for mye i paradis og tid for sesongens første partnerseremoni!

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 204
programme.desc: Det handler om å gi og ta når en ny gjest sjekker inn.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 205
programme.desc: Konfliktnivået når nye høyder etter dagens avstemning. Hvem ender til slutt opp med en trygg sitteplass?

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jompens Första Vilt
programme.desc: Jompen skjuter sin första hjort efter att ha klarat jägarexamen på Jägareförbundet.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Dovpyrsch & Jompen Och Stoffe Jagar
programme.desc: Jompen pyrschar dov med Jägaren och Kocken.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Best Of 2020
programme.desc: Den här veckan visar vi upp några av våra bästa jaktsekvenser från 2020!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Kronpyrsch i Skåne
programme.desc: Jompen åker på drevjakt samt pyrschjakt på kron nere i Skåne. Väl där möter han upp Danne och Calle Dreyer för att både jaga och laga mat. Grymt lyckad jakt på viltrik mark!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Ripjakt
programme.desc: Lubbe och Jompen åker till Klimpfjäll i södra Lappland för att jaga ripa.

programme.desc: Jompen smyger på räv, dovhjort och vildsvin. Fantastisk vacker dag med skare som försvårar Jompens skottmöjligheter.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Första Drevjakten För Året
programme.desc: Jompen och Mats är på årets första drevjakt 2017. Rådjursjakt med hagel står på schemat och vi befinner oss utanför Stockholm.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Askas Första Klövvilt
programme.desc: Jompen och Christoffer tränar och jagar med Aska i nästan ett års tid. Nu är tiden mogen att fälla Askas första klövvilt i hägnet på Almunge Hundcenter.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt I Vinterskog & Jompens Första Hjort
programme.desc: Lubbe och teamet kämpar i snöväder och kyla i jakten på hjort och rådjur när en majestätisk älg plötsligt stegar fram ur buskagen.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Croatia
programme.desc: ‘The Mountain’ Hafthor Julius Björnsson is back in Croatia, where some of Game of Thrones series is filmed. In the ancient city of Split, modern gladiators compete.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Poland
programme.desc: Half-way to the world grand finals in Malaysia, in the home country of current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski, watch competitors battle it out for the SCL and ’The Strongest Man in Poland’titles.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Austria
programme.desc: The home country of the current world champion – Martin Wildauer. In the mountains of Austria competitors face the truck pull, yoke race, deadlift, frame walk, and dumbbell.

programme.title: Manchester United - For the Glory
programme.desc: Manchester United are one of the most award winning teams in the sport, with over 650 million fans worldwide.

programme.title: South Park: Universets største drittsekk
programme.desc: Cartman føler seg ikke bra etter å ha drukket Kennys aske og blitt besatt av sjelen hans, og sendes til sykehuset.

programme.desc: Det er halloween, og Satan holder verdens største kostymefest.

programme.desc: Cartman anser Token for å være en trussel mot hele menneskeheten.

programme.desc: Kyle leker med ilden når han blander seg i Cartman og Heidis forhold.

programme.desc: Paris Hilton åpner butikk i South Park og forderver jentenes moral - bare Wendy holder fast på sine prinsipper.

programme.desc: Takket være Stans 'håndarbeid' må barna i South Park holde ut seksualundervisning fra den usannsynlige duoen Mr. Mackey og Ms. Choksondik.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1102
programme.desc: Det er styrke, utholdenhet og akrobatikk som står i fokus når Anders Aukland, Martine Ek Hagen og Marthe Kristoffersen skal kjempe mot Lars Berger, Jonathan Nordbotten og Espen Jansen om den store gullskatten.

programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.desc: Barbrady ber guttene om hjelp til å løse en sak, og Cartman lar seg rive med av sin nye autoritet.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman får en analundersøkelse
programme.desc: Cartman drømmer at han møter et romvesen, men de andre guttene er sikre på at drømmen var virkelighet.

programme.desc: Guttene bryter seg inn for å stjele urnen med Kennys aske.

programme.desc: De hysteriske foreldrene i South Park får enda en grunn til panikk når 'cheesing' blir poplært blant barna.

programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park begynner å eksplodere uten forvarsel. Stans far tar saken.

programme.title: South Park: Øyekatarr
programme.desc: Det er Halloween i South Park, og Kenny blir drept av en styrtende romstasjon og forvandlet til en zombie, ved hjelp av balsameringsvæske og Worcestersaus.

programme.title: South Park: Universets største drittsekk
programme.desc: Cartman føler seg ikke bra etter å ha drukket Kennys aske og blitt besatt av sjelen hans, og sendes til sykehuset.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: Når gutta reiser til Aspen for å stå på ski for første gang, legger Stan seg ut med lokalbefolkningen og blir utfordret til et løp.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium er ikke gratis
programme.desc: Stan blir avhengig av det nye mobilspillet med Terrance og Phillip.

programme.title: South Park: Skogsdyrenes jul
programme.desc: Julenissen må drepe alle onde dyr i South Park og redde verden etter at Stan narres til å hjelpe dem med fødselen til frelseren deres.

programme.title: South Park: South Parks fantastiske påskespesial
programme.desc: Stan vil finne opprinnelsen til malte påskeegg og oppdager en hemmelighet om den katolske kirken.

programme.title: South Park: Du har null venner
programme.desc: Mot bedre vitende, blir Stan med på Facebook og blir en sosialt nettworkende 'juggernaut', noe som forårsaker at han selv blir sugd inn i websiden.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle står overfor sitt store gjennombrudd med Guitar Hero-ferdighetene sine. Manageren deres overbeviser Stan om at Kyle holder ham tilbake, og skaper spenninger mellom dem.

programme.title: South Park: Utlogget
programme.desc: Forvirring og panikk råder da Internett blir borte i South Park!

programme.title: South Park: Du holder på å bli gammel
programme.desc: Når Stan får en Tween Wave-CD til burdag, gir foreldrene ham forbud om å lytte til det 'søppelet'. Stan begynner å bli enig med dem, men vennene hans lar seg ikke imponere.

programme.title: South Park: Alt om mormonere?
programme.desc: En ny gutt, Gary, flytter til South Park, og familien hans er mormonere. Eric blir venn med ham, men blir skuffet over mormonismen.

programme.title: South Park: Mitt fremtidige meg
programme.desc: South Park blir rammet av en kraftig storm, og en naken fremmed påstår at han er Stan fra fremtiden.

programme.desc: Cartman spiller matchmaker når en ny jente flytter til South Park.

programme.desc: Etter en pinlig affære som involverer guttedeler, blir Cartman sendt på sinnemestringskurs og Randy prøver så godt han kan å takle det.

programme.desc: Når Butters involverer seg i en Asiatisk bakkekrig, oppdager foreldrene hans at han har flere personligheter og bestemmer at medisinering er eneste utvei.

programme.desc: Garrison vil bygge en mur for å holde alle immigrantene uten dokumentasjon ute.
