programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og spesialgjest Lolo Wood at selv dommere kan oppleve stygge 'Dommertreff', at de kan bli fiskemat under 'Vannattakk og de hopper over instruksjoner i 'Anvisningskaos'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood imot høyhastighetpresanger i 'Gaver i forbifarten', opplever massiv bråstopp i 'Løperhinder' og blir opprørt av 'Kritiske mødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' foretar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood litt amatørmessig jordforflytning med 'Helgedosere', tar med ungene i butikken i 'Shoppingmonstere' og setter nesen sørover og opplever litt 'Landsens vrede'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' feirer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood noen første smeller som ektepar med 'Første store feilsteg', prøver å kommunisere med berusede ved å 'Snakke fyllisk' og opplever fryktløse folk som er 'Slangesikre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hodet høyt for å unngå 'Baller fra oven', tar et lett kaotisk bad og opplever full 'Badekarinvasjon' og får hører den ufiltrerte sannheten av 'Søte små kritikere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' morer Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg i parkeringsanlegg med 'Garasjegøy', ser at avløpsåpnere kan brukes til mer enn kun nummer to i 'Mangefasetterte avløpsåpnere' og lurer døden i 'Nesten knust'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg noen ordentlige 'Foreldreoverraskelser', ruller med noen skikkelig 'Dediserte inlineløpere' og mister litt kontroll i 'Radioustyrlige'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjemmer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Carly Aquilino drinken for Drikketyver', ser nye merkelige antrekk i 'Bærbare rariteter' og får andrehånds skrubbsår av trafikanter som følger regelen 'Se i begge retninger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og gjest Carly Aquilino trappene med barn som gjør noen 'Mini-feilsteg', tester senger med 'Madrassprøving' og lokaliserer alle de løse skruene i 'Oppussingsanger'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Bunker Hill
programme.desc: Dylan og hans nye Commonwealth-flåte tar på seg Drago-Kazov-flåten, men synes den er mye større enn forventet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ouroboros
programme.desc: Magog-eggene i Harper begynner å klekkes, så teamet bygger en Tesseract-maskin

programme.title: Andromeda: Lava og raketter
programme.desc: Dylan overtar en turistpram i et forsøk på å unnslippe leiesoldater.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vær alle mine synder husket
programme.desc: En kroppsidentifikasjon går galt når det viser seg at Bekas tidligere mannskap ikke er død.

programme.title: Andromeda: Mayflies dans
programme.desc: Andromeda redder døende mennesker fra en drift, men de blir snart til zombier som blir kontrollert av en bikube.

programme.title: Andromeda: I himmelen er nå tre
programme.desc: Motoren til skapelsen er i stand til å omskrive universet i henhold til eierens ønsker. Dylan, Beka og Trance må skaffe det før noen med mørke planer får det.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up On Crime
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Murdered Heiress, UFO Odyssey Pts. 1 & 2, England Heir, Update: Looking for Christopher and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Temple President's Murder, Ready Teller Robbery, Haunting on 37th Street, Where's Jim?, Update: Cult of Decloud and Jane Doe's Ashes.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: College Student Murders, Hemingway Curse, Friends to the End, Footlocker Bones, Update: Sweet Sue and School Bus Family.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Newlywed Escape, Iceman, Gang Mom, Experts/ Walker, Update: Motorcyclist's Samaritan and Little Miss Panasoffkee.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Balcony Death, Wickenburg Massacre, Dear Patricia, Update: Prison Mom, Cowboy Bandit and Life on Mars.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Huey Long Pts. 1 & 2, Not Home for the Holidays, Broken Hearts, Update: Thanks Lieutenant Stevens and Best Friend's Sister.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killing Spree
programme.desc: In 1984, in South Florida, a rapist and murderer was on the loose. The killer was a ruthless and terrifying predator, the newest member of an infamous group known as serial killers.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner's Casebook
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Blooded
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: To Kill Again
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Proof Of Innocence
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Discoveries
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean investigate Norris Green Mansion. A 17th Century building, which is believed to hold some of the most haunted spirits in Liverpool. Will they make contact its ghostly entities tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Soul Less House of Ghosts - Part 1
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by a special guest as they investigate an abandoned home full of spirits in Liverpool.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Soul Less House of Ghosts - Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension encounter something paranormal in this exclusive unseen footage from their invetsigation of the Soul Less House in Liverpool.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Sean and Bex begin their chilling investigation at the historic Clifton Hall Masonic Temple. Hidden behind closed doors for over a century, this sacred space holds more than just ritual secrets. They explore the eerie corridors and lodge rooms.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: The investigation continues as Bex and Sean split up to face the darkness alone inside Clifton Hall. From intelligent knocking and voices to the chilling sound of a child and unseen footsteps on the carpet.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In a church reborn as a gym, something old still lingers in the shadows. Sean and Bex investigate Dream Body Gym inside the former Manor Church — where whispers echo through stairwells, music box melodies drift through empty rooms.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother in Denial
programme.desc: When ordinary people need help, Steve Wilkos is ready to answer the call. Watch as Steve helps ordinary people stand up for themselves and fight for what he believes in order to promote justice for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother's Rage
programme.desc: Three years later, Elizabeth still carries strong doubts about Manny's intentions with her family and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is Manny innocent?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to neglect and abuse her kids. Scott’s fiancée stepped up as a mother and Stephanie failed multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the kids, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?
programme.desc: Maria claims that her son’s ex Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says Maria is a racist and angry over raising her grandchild in a Hispanic home!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: What Happened to My Baby?
programme.desc: Baby Garrett died of an oxycodone drug overdose while in Sharon’s care. His mother Casey left him with Sharon so she could visit her husband Kenneth in the hospital. Who’s responsible?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Wait! Don't Read The Results Yet Steve...
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to live with them just because she’s the mother of his child.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it’s up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: Neighbors are aghast when Ernestine Addison and her teen son Bobby are gunned down in cold blood. The case heats up when Kenda receives word that the killer’s murderous rampage isn’t over just yet.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. But six months later, Kenda receives an unprompted confession .

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Officer Down
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda is faced with his worst nightmare when he learns a friend and fellow officer, Mark Dabling, has been killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Chris Schaffer has not been seen or heard from in five days. Finally, his friends find him dead and decomposed in the driver’s seat of his van.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cop Killer
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rendlesham Forest UFO Incident
programme.desc: Richard travels to England to investigate Britain's Roswell, also known as the Woodbridge-Bentwaters UFO incident, considered by many to be one of the best documented UFO cases on record

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Central Banking Conspiracy
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several independent researchers about the efforts of international bankers to control the course of history and enslave humanity through their monopoly of the creation of money and the manipulation of the money supply.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Could vampires be real? A well-known U.S. paranormal investigator and folklorist in New York City recounts the legend and evolution of the vampire throughout history and from culture to culture.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Roswell UFO Crash
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Death of Princess Diana - Tragic Car Accident or Murder Most Foul?
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Secret Space Program
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Werewolves
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Mill Street Barracks
programme.desc: Built in 1861 Mill Street Barracks is steeped in rich history. It has accommodated many branches of the armed forces throughout its life. Like many other barracks it has also been used as a morgue making it a prime location for the supernatural.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: The Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker is a former government-owned nuclear bunker located at Hack Green, Cheshire, England. It Started as a decoy site for enemy bombers but later developed into a legitimate base. Now it is ripe with hauntings.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Ledsager Max tryllekunstneren, Sydney og Nigel reiser til Atlantic City, New Jersey på jakt etter Ungarns tapte og angivelig forbannede Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt og avsky i Melkeveien
programme.desc: Gerentex er tilbake, og han krever at Trance og Harper hjelper ham med sitt nye opplegg: å finne Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Andromeda: Djevelen tar den bakerste
programme.desc: Dylan og Rev Bem hjelper et fredelig samfunn med å stå opp mot sine kommende slaver, men de må være forsiktige: hvis Dylan lærer dem å drepe, vil barna deres bli født og vite det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Honningstilbudet
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å bringe fred til to forskjellige Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter ved å eskortere prinsesse til den ene til hennes arrangerte ekteskap med prinsen til den andre

programme.title: Andromeda: Stjernekryss
programme.desc: Rommies avatar blir forelsket i det som viser seg å være avataren til et krigsskip ved navn Gabriel. Gabriel prøver å smitte Rommie med et virus som sender planene sine til krigsskipet

programme.title: Mutant X: Presumed Guilty
programme.desc: Adam er innrammet for drap av en ny mutant med evnen til å stjele folks minner.

programme.desc: Police try to retrace a young mother's last known movements in an attempt to solve her mysterious disappearance.

programme.desc: Mary-Jane Marquardt, mother and wife from Chippewa, Wisconsin, was found stabbed to death in her own home. With Mary-Jane's son also missing, the detectives couldn't help but wonder if his disappearance was connected to the murder.

programme.desc: AJ and James battle a DC-4 engine fire. It's Joe's 69th birthday - and he's never flown a helicopter before, so Mikey plans a special gift of chopper flight lessons.

programme.title: Cops: Thick as Thieves
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair
programme.desc: On December 20, 2012, in Val d'Izé (Ille-et-Vilaine), Aurélie Barbot, 29, was killed on her doorstep with a bullet to the head.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Laurence Dromard Case
programme.desc: Sylvain Dromard finds the body of his wife Laurence lying in a pool of blood in the kitchen. The crime was particularly violent and the theory of a burglary that went wrong is soon excluded. But investigators don't understand who could want her dead.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 607

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 103

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 204
programme.desc: På kvelden 1. nyttårsdag i 2012 utløses trygghetsalarmen hjemme hos 98 år gamle Hilda Feste. Da hjemmetjenesten rykker ut blir de vitne til en grufull hendelse. Politiet starter umiddelbart opp jakten på gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 403
programme.desc: Marit Ødegaard jobber på en veikro ikke langt fra svenskegrensen. En oktoberdag i 2000 dukker hun ikke opp på jobb. Kort tid etter blir Marit funnet drept i hjemmet sitt

programme.title: Signs of Evil - The Runes of the SS
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS stands for terror and the murder of millions. Documentary about the history of a symbol that represents murder.

programme.title: Secret War: The SAS Italian Job
programme.desc: In 1945, during the Italian Spring offensive, SOE agent Michael Lees and SAS officer Roy Farran led a raid on German HQs at Villa Rossi and Villa Calvi. Despite orders to cancel, Farran attacked with SAS men and partisans, killing many Germans.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Traitor-in-Chief
programme.desc: Pierre Laval, once celebrated and later reviled, faced execution in 1945 for collaboration with the Nazis during Vichy France. Originally a socialist and pacifist, he fell into collaboration for power and to navigate the horrors of occupation.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Island War
programme.desc: The Marines succeed in the "island hopping" strategy against suicidal resistance. The US Navy establishes supremacy, cutting off Japan.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Hitler's Biggest Blunder
programme.desc: Hitler rules Europe triumphantly, hailed as a hero in Germany. Hitler invades the Soviet Union, promising swift victory over communism, but progress stalls. As Germany faces setbacks, Hitler retreats to his bunker in Poland, increasingly reliant on drugs.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly utdelingen
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie holder en iCarly-galla for de beste bruker-bidragene i iCarly, og hyller pristagerne live på web-showet. Spencer verver europeiske badedraktmodeller for å hjelpe ham å lage premiestatuettene.

programme.title: iCarly: Tvillinger
programme.desc: Freddie prøver å bevise at Melanie, Sams tvillingesøster, er Sam i forkledning. Når Carly underviser Spencers nemesis, Chuck, prøver Spencer å overbevise henne om at Chuck er ond.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 2
programme.desc: Når Carly oppdager at hennes tøffe kjæreste Griffin samler på små Pee Wee Babies, må hun ta stilling til om hun holder ut å date en kar som har en kosedyrsamling. I mens forsøker Spencer å hjelpe Sam med å bli kvitt et mareritt.

programme.title: iCarly: iKamp mot Dingo
programme.desc: Dingo-kanalen har stjålet idéer fra iCarly, så Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer drar til Dingos Studio for å fortelle manusforfatterne hva de mener om det.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg tror de kysset
programme.desc: Da Sam kommer til å avsløre overfor Carly at hun og Freddie smugkysset, konfronterer Carly dem med hvorfor de ikke fortalte henne om det. Og Spencer underviser fanger i billedkunst i fengselet.

programme.title: iCarly: Kokkekamp
programme.desc: Når Carl, Sam og Freddie vinner over en berømt tv-kokk i en matlagningskonkurranse, vil ikke kokken lage mat mer og nekter å komme ut av soverommet sitt. Spencer prøver å oppfylle en fremtidsdrøm.

programme.title: iCarly: Rektor kampen
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie får rektor Franklin sparket, overtar miss Briggs og mr. Howard ledelsen og innfører strenge regler. Og Spencer leier en gammel rodeostjerne til å lære ham å ri på en mekanisk okse.

programme.title: iCarly: iSpeed Date
programme.desc: Så mange gutter dukker opp til 'ta Carly med på fest'-konkurransen, at Carly, Sam og Freddie må benytte speed-dating for å møte dem alle sammen. Spencer følger et merkelig treningsprogram fra en ny app.

programme.title: iCarly: Stjernehjelp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie skal lage en musikkvideo til en popstjernes comeback, oppdager de at popstjernen er ute av form og talentløs. Og Spencer oppdager at kvinnen han dater er Gibbys mor.

programme.title: iCarly: Livredderen
programme.desc: Når Freddie redder livet til Carly, forelsker Carly seg i ham. Sam og Spencer kjemper mot hverandre i et painball-spill som heter Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly: Lewberts tapte kjærlighet
programme.desc: Når gjengen oppdager at Lewbert engang var en lykkelig ung mann som var forlovet med en vakker kvinne, setter de seg fore å gjenforene det adskilte paret.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Mens Norms eks-sekretær faller for Cliff, søker Rebecca etter en "skjult skatt" i en gave fra Robin.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam, Carla og Norm seiler i Robin Colcords båt når de oppdager at det finnes en bombe om bord.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebeccas favorittprofessor kommer på besøk, og til stor vantro har professoren en kort affære med Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Wall Of Youth / Rabies Scare
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head get to express their innermost feeling in a special art exhibit. / Beavis becomes rabid.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Pool Toys / Beavis & Butt-Head's Island
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head help Mr. Anderson build an in-ground swimming pool. / "Beavis and Butt-head get stranded on their own island, while in search of cool chicks, like Ginger.BALL BREAKERS: Just how DO you crack open a bowling ball?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Substitute / Shopping List
programme.desc: A substitute teacher tries unconventional methods to reach Beavis and Butt-head. / Tom Anderson sends Beavis and Butt-head to the store to pick up a few items. They don't do a very good job.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Holy Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head is really screwed when a visit to the hospital once again awakens The Great Cornoholio in Beavis. But two rooms over, the leader of a cult has died. Is the Great Cornholio destined to be the cult's idiot savior?

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bedpans & Broomsticks / Yogurt's Cool (aka Try Yogurt)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head pay off a debt to society by doing community service work in a hospital. / A suggestive commercial convinces Beavis & Butt-head it's time to try frozen yogurt.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost. / Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood. / For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Date with Destiny
programme.desc: Sabrina and her friends return to school and a lot of excitement after summer break.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: What’s News?
programme.desc: Josh lands a job as a photojournalist for the Boston Citizen, and is surprised to learn that Sabrina is a fan of his new boss, Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Murder on the Halloween Express
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda are invited to attend a murder mystery party on the Halloween Mystery Train, which makes a stop in Boston.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Gift of Gab
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are thrilled to get their own show on the campus radio station, a two hour talk show they call "Chick Chat."

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Thin Ice
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a jam when ex-boyfriend Harvey requests that she use her magical powers to help him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Hex, Lies, and No Videotape
programme.desc: Josh gets Sabrina an internship at the Boston Citizen where he works.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Humble Pie
programme.desc: Sabrina and her roommates discover that Morgan didn't pay her portion of the rent when the housing office sends a student to replace her in the house.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Birthday Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina receives an unexpected surprise on her birthday, a visit from her evil Aunt Irms, the matriarch of the Spellman family.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Deliver Us from Email
programme.desc: Intern Sabrina wants to propose writing her own column about the college experience to Boston Citizen editor Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cloud Ten
programme.desc: In an attempt to escape her problems, Sabrina decides to visit her childhood friend, Cathy Winter (Colleen Ann Fitzpatrick) in the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Candidate
programme.desc: Sabrina is assigned to research the local city councilman election for an article, which will run in the Boston Citizen.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Read It And Weep (Part 2)
programme.desc: Jennifer faces the music after reading a book that the school banned.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Spring Reminds Me
programme.desc: Mallory deals with a friend’s tragic suicide.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Quittin' Time (Aka Cinderella)
programme.desc: Lauren drops her college thesis to spend more time with Alex.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Boys Next Door
programme.desc: Elyse’s high school friends can’t move on from the past.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Father, Can You Spare A Dime?
programme.desc: Nick asks his estranged father for a loan to open up his own art school.

programme.title: Fem i familien: A Sign Of The Times
programme.desc: Andy takes drastic measures to help a deaf friend.

programme.title: Fem i familien: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: The Keaton's camping trip turns into a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Designing Woman
programme.desc: Mallory discovers another employee is stealing her fashion designs.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Truckers
programme.desc: Alex feels left out when Andy begins making new friends.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Scariest Movie Ever
programme.desc: En vampyr avslører seg selv, en seriemorder blir forhindret og et barn får ønsket sitt oppfylt.

programme.title: Key & Peele: A Cappella Club
programme.desc: En PSA jobber med barnesoldater i Afrika, en college-a-cappella-gruppe får et nytt medlem, Meegan og André går på sin første date, en terrorgruppe har en matbil og to gamle menn diskuterer popmusikk.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Cunnilingus Class
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Mr. T lærer oss livsleksjoner, Wendell har bruk for en ny seng og en fornærmelse som går over streken.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at kara har en dårlig Skype-forbindelse, en Django Unchained-slavekamp og en baseballspiller som klasker for mange rumper.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Das Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan prøver å gjemme seg for en negerjaktende nazist. Andre sketsjer inkluderer to slaver som sliter med å bli solgt, et par kriminelle som kommer i knipe før et stort kupp.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meagan's Fight
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Meagan vender tilbake, Jordan prøver å se kul ut på en strippeklubb og opptrer med et funk-show.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Aerobics Meltdown
programme.desc: Stan Lee har noen nye superhelter, og en gatesmart fyr mister sin street cred når han opplever en hjernefrysning. Og sist, men ikke minst, utvikler en mann en komplisert minnesanordning for å huske hvor han har parkert.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama College Years
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan befinner seg plutselig i en gjenoppføring av Borgerkrigen, Jesus møter en farlig hallik, og vi får en god titt på president Barack Obama de første årene på college.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MMMMMM
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan opptrer foran et oppstemt publikum, en trafikkreporter blir utsatt for turbulens i et helikopter og halvdelen av en R&B duo avslører sine sanne følelser for sin partner under en opptreden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Power of Wings
programme.desc: Inkluderer sketsjer der Keegan og Jordan avlytter hvite kvinner som elsker svarte menn, Wendell lager en musikkvideo og Kareem og Jahar går på treningssenteret.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Soul Food
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan diskuterer hvem som er mest svart, og å være den eneste svarte på en fest. Sketsjer inkluderer Tea Party som oppdager et nytt håp, hærens ververe som tenker annerledes, og Bobby McFerrin som duellerer mot Michael Winslow.

programme.title: Broad City: Along Came Molly
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana og Bevers selger Abbis eiendeler i New York; Abbi får billetter til en Lil Wayne-konsert, og jentene tar en 'tripp'.

programme.title: Broad City: Broad City
programme.desc: Jentene tar farvel.

programme.title: Broad City: What A Wonderful World
programme.desc: Ilana får nyss om en hemmelig Lil Wayne-konsert. Sammen med Abbi loffer hun seg frem i New York. Jentene lar ingenting hindre dem i å skrape sammen nok penger til billettene. Selv om det blir skremmende, mister de aldri målet av sikte.

programme.title: Broad City: Stolen Phone
programme.desc: Etter å ha prøvd å finne gutter på Facebook, bestemmer Abbi og Ilana seg for å prøve å finne gutter i 'virkeligheten'.

programme.title: Broad City: Working Girls
programme.desc: Ilana prøver å tjene litt ekstra penger i 'temp game'. Abbi lover naboen sin å vente på pakken hans, men hun går glipp av leveransen og må dra til verdens ende for å få fatt i den.

programme.title: Broad City: The Lockout
programme.desc: Når Abbi får sprøytet leiligheten sin mot skadedyr og Ilana mister nøklene sine, blir jentene nødt til å bo på gaten - akkurat når Abbi har sin første kunstutstilling.

programme.title: Broad City: P*$$Y Weed
programme.desc: Jentene må bli voksne! Abbi vil kjøpe sin egen marihuana, som en voksen kvinne, mens Ilana må takle skatten på egen hånd. Og, jentene er høye som hus.

programme.title: Broad City: Fattest Asses
programme.desc: Når Abbi innser at hun er for snill, blir hun mere bitchy. Ilana bestemmer seg for å nå sitt fulle potential. De går på en eksklusiv fest og møter noen eventyrlige DJ-er. Nå kan ingenting gå galt.

programme.title: Broad City: Hurricane Wanda
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana klarer sig igennem stormen med hjælp fra deres venner (Jaimé, Lincoln og Jeremy), men de får desværre selskab af Bevers og hans søster. Et spil 'Who Done It?' udspiller sig, mens orkanan raser udenfor.

programme.title: Broad City: In Heat
programme.desc: Ilana leter febrilsk etter en gave i siste øyeblikk til Lincoln, mens Abbi prøver å finne et klimaanlegg for å få det kjølig på soveværelset.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Viacom Grinch
programme.desc: Declan and Junior crack down on knockoff Nickelodeon toys, ruining kids' parties across Reno.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Midnight Swingers
programme.desc: Jones and Williams penetrate the inner circle of Reno's swingers club.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Secret Santa
programme.desc: What were those strange lights in the desert? Who are these new Reno Sheriff's Department deputies?

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Couple's Therapy
programme.desc: Wiegel and Williams work on their communication at couples therapy when Wiegel's insurance dries up.

programme.title: RENO 911!: How We Do It in Reno
programme.desc: Dejected after a day of unsuccessful crime fighting, Officer Dangle rear-ends a civilian and discovers 60 pounds of marijuana in the first episode of this iconic comedy series.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Fireworks
programme.desc: When the Mayor's kid blows his thumb off with an illegal explosive, the officers are put on the line to rid Reno of contraband fireworks.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Execution Tickets
programme.desc: The deputies partake in a scavenger hunt to determine who gets to attend the execution of a convicted felon, and Williams gives a suspect a makeover.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Clementine's Pregnant
programme.desc: A mandatory staff drug test reveals a surprise pregnancy, and Lt. Dangle has a brush with a celebrity.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Jones Gets Suspended
programme.desc: Jones enjoys some unexpected perks after being relegated to crossing guard duty, and Dangle's bike is stolen again.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Help From the FBI
programme.desc: While the FBI investigates a Reno homicide, members of the Sheriff's Department put their best feet forward.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla & Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Piss on You & The World's Greatest Wars
programme.desc: Dave presents the History Channel coverage of great inner-city gang wars from the 1980s.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Make-A-Wish & Fisticuff
programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses
programme.desc: Dave shows what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Black Star.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Samuel Jackson Beer & Racial Draft
programme.desc: Dave debuts Samuel Jackson beer and reveals major upsets in "The Racial Draft."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Negrodamus & The Niggar Family
programme.desc: Paul Mooney introduces Negrodamus, and Dave imagines a black Gallagher.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance & The Three Daves

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract & True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Rick James is one of the baddest mothaf**kers of all time.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Internet & Moment in the Life of Lil Jon
programme.desc: Dave walks in Lil Jon's shoes and considers the Internet's sleaziness.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: World Series of Dice & Mooney on Movies
programme.desc: The Marcy Projects hosts a champion shooter contest, and Paul Mooney talks "Gone with the Wind."

programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby, blant annet ramlende Scarlets nettoppreisning og Terrell Owens kjendisvideo.

programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby, med blant annet ballongfyren Bill Monroes nettoppreisning, Jack McBrayers kjendisvideo og hvite jenter som imiterer Bill Cosby.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Worst Best Man Speech
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på en nettoppreisning for verdens verste forlover, lunsj med Harland Williams og så svarer Daniel på deres tweets.

programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på en nettoppreisning for Reh Doggs 'Why Must I Cry'-video og Kristin Cavallaris kjendisvideo.

programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på Daniels popkorn-utfordring, Dizzy Dunks nettoppreisning og Tommy Chung er med i "Gress eller salvia?".

programme.title: Tosh.0: Skateboard Girl
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på videosvar fra popkornutfordringen, skateboard-jentas nettoppreisning og et tilbakeblikk på de ti første episodene.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tron Guy
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh tar for seg alt det Internett har å tilby. I kveld byr han på et intervju med YouTube-sensasjonen Fred og 'Tron'-fyrens nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline cheers Richard on when he gets the chance to win big money by making the half-court free-throw shot at a New York Knicks game.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard finds himself in a life-or-death predicament when Caroline aims to boost the value of his work by convincing an influential art columnist that Richard is a deceased artist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feels that Annie consistently chooses the men in her life over their friendship and challenges Annie to take a girls-only trip, but chaos ensues when they take a trip together and both girls find romance at a local ski resort.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline, who is trying to face single life bravely, tries her hand at an evening on the town alone, with a little coaching from Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline supports Del in his efforts to expand business for her "Caroline in the City" cartoon strip and merchandise.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline's naive, helpful nature comes out in full bloom when she starts catering to her new elderly neighbor, Miriam, but Annie thinks Caroline is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that only one newspaper in the country has not renewed her cartoon strip, she obsesses on the matter until finally convincing herself to face the editors in person.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline has difficulty confronting her neglectful building superintendent, Mr. Tedescu about her faulty plumbing, so she hires a mediator to pressure Mr. Tedescu into taking care of her request.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard is stunned when his former love Julia informs him that she is about to be married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: Taxi
